### BSP_COM_Init

```text
=== BSP_COM_Init 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/BSP/STM324xG_EVAL/stm324xg_eval.c
- 行号：351
- 函数内容：void BSP_COM_Init(COM_TypeDef COM, UART_HandleTypeDef *huart)
{
  GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStruct;
  
  /* Enable GPIO clock */
  EVAL_COMx_TX_GPIO_CLK_ENABLE(COM);
  EVAL_COMx_RX_GPIO_CLK_ENABLE(COM);
  
  /* Enable USART clock */
  EVAL_COMx_CLK_ENABLE(COM);
  
  /* Configure USART Tx as alternate function */
  GPIO_InitStruct.Pin = COM_TX_PIN[COM];
  GPIO_InitStruct.Mode = GPIO_MODE_AF_PP;
  GPIO_InitStruct.Speed = GPIO_SPEED_FAST;
  GPIO_InitStruct.Pull = GPIO_PULLUP;
  GPIO_InitStruct.Alternate = COM_TX_AF[COM];
  HAL_GPIO_Init(COM_TX_PORT[COM], &GPIO_InitStruct);
  
  /* Configure USART Rx as alternate function */
  GPIO_InitStruct.Pin = COM_RX_PIN[COM];
  GPIO_InitStruct.Mode = GPIO_MODE_AF_PP;
  GPIO_InitStruct.Alternate = COM_RX_AF[COM];
  HAL_GPIO_Init(COM_RX_PORT[COM], &GPIO_InitStruct);
  
  /* USART configuration */
  huart->Instance = COM_USART[COM];
  HAL_UART_Init(huart);
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Configures COM port (UART) hardware for STM32 evaluation board by enabling clocks, configuring GPIO pins as alternate functions, and initializing UART peripheral.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Based on analysis: 1) GetFunctionInfo shows this is a hardware initialization function that configures COM ports; 2) GetMMIOFunctionInfo reveals multiple hardware register accesses through clock enable macros and GPIO initialization; 3) The function performs peripheral initialization (enables clocks, configures GPIO pins, sets UART instance, calls HAL_UART_Init); 4) No data transmission/reception (not RECV), no interrupt handling (not IRQ), no polling loops (not LOOP), and no NVIC/OS/VTOR operations (not CORE). According to classification priority (CORE > RECV > IRQ > INIT > LOOP > ...), this is clearly an INIT type function that initializes hardware resources.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**
* @brief  Configures COM port.
* @param  COM: COM port to be configured.
*          This parameter can be one of the following values:
*            @arg  COM1
*            @arg  COM2
* @param  huart: Pointer to a UART_HandleTypeDef structure that contains the
*                configuration information for the specified USART peripheral.
*/
void BSP_COM_Init(COM_TypeDef COM, UART_HandleTypeDef *huart)
{
  GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStruct;
  
  /* Skip hardware-specific clock enables */
  /* EVAL_COMx_TX_GPIO_CLK_ENABLE(COM); */
  /* EVAL_COMx_RX_GPIO_CLK_ENABLE(COM); */
  /* EVAL_COMx_CLK_ENABLE(COM); */
  
  /* Skip GPIO configuration for TX */
  /* GPIO_InitStruct.Pin = COM_TX_PIN[COM]; */
  /* GPIO_InitStruct.Mode = GPIO_MODE_AF_PP; */
  /* GPIO_InitStruct.Speed = GPIO_SPEED_FAST; */
  /* GPIO_InitStruct.Pull = GPIO_PULLUP; */
  /* GPIO_InitStruct.Alternate = COM_TX_AF[COM]; */
  /* HAL_GPIO_Init(COM_TX_PORT[COM], &GPIO_InitStruct); */
  
  /* Skip GPIO configuration for RX */
  /* GPIO_InitStruct.Pin = COM_RX_PIN[COM]; */
  /* GPIO_InitStruct.Mode = GPIO_MODE_AF_PP; */
  /* GPIO_InitStruct.Alternate = COM_RX_AF[COM]; */
  /* HAL_GPIO_Init(COM_RX_PORT[COM], &GPIO_InitStruct); */
  
  /* USART configuration - preserve instance assignment */
  huart->Instance = COM_USART[COM];
  
  /* Call HAL_UART_Init which will handle its own hardware abstraction */
  HAL_UART_Init(huart);
}

{ 
  sramHandle.Instance = FMC_NORSRAM_DEVICE;
  sramHandle.Extended = FMC_NORSRAM_EXTENDED_DEVICE;
  
  /* SRAM device configuration */  
  Timing.AddressSetupTime      = 2;
  Timing.AddressHoldTime       = 1;
  Timing.DataSetupTime         = 2;
  Timing.BusTurnAroundDuration = 1;
  Timing.CLKDivision           = 2;
  Timing.DataLatency           = 2;
  Timing.AccessMode            = FSMC_ACCESS_MODE_A;
  
  sramHandle.Init.NSBank             = FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK2;
  sramHandle.Init.DataAddressMux     = FSMC_DATA_ADDRESS_MUX_DISABLE;
  sramHandle.Init.MemoryType         = FSMC_MEMORY_TYPE_SRAM;
  sramHandle.Init.MemoryDataWidth    = SRAM_MEMORY_WIDTH;
  sramHandle.Init.BurstAccessMode    = SRAM_BURSTACCESS;
  sramHandle.Init.WaitSignalPolarity = FSMC_WAIT_SIGNAL_POLARITY_LOW;
  sramHandle.Init.WrapMode           = FSMC_WRAP_MODE_DISABLE;
  sramHandle.Init.WaitSignalActive   = FSMC_WAIT_TIMING_BEFORE_WS;
  sramHandle.Init.WriteOperation     = FSMC_WRITE_OPERATION_ENABLE;
  sramHandle.Init.WaitSignal         = FSMC_WAIT_SIGNAL_DISABLE;
  sramHandle.Init.ExtendedMode       = FSMC_EXTENDED_MODE_DISABLE;
  sramHandle.Init.AsynchronousWait   = FSMC_ASYNCHRONOUS_WAIT_DISABLE;
  sramHandle.Init.WriteBurst         = SRAM_WRITEBURST;
    
  /* SRAM controller initialization */
  BSP_SRAM_MspInit();
  if(HAL_SRAM_Init(&sramHandle, &Timing, &Timing) != HAL_OK)
  {
    return SRAM_ERROR;
  }
  else
  {
    return SRAM_OK;
  }
}

### DMA_SetConfig

```text
=== DMA_SetConfig 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_dma.c
- 行号：1151
- 函数内容：static void DMA_SetConfig(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma, uint32_t SrcAddress, uint32_t DstAddress, uint32_t DataLength)
{
  /* Clear DBM bit */
  hdma->Instance->CR &= (uint32_t)(~DMA_SxCR_DBM);

  /* Configure DMA Stream data length */
  hdma->Instance->NDTR = DataLength;

  /* Memory to Peripheral */
  if((hdma->Init.Direction) == DMA_MEMORY_TO_PERIPH)
  {
    /* Configure DMA Stream destination address */
    hdma->Instance->PAR = DstAddress;

    /* Configure DMA Stream source address */
    hdma->Instance->M0AR = SrcAddress;
  }
  /* Peripheral to Memory */
  else
  {
    /* Configure DMA Stream source address */
    hdma->Instance->PAR = SrcAddress;

    /* Configure DMA Stream destination address */
    hdma->Instance->M0AR = DstAddress;
  }
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Sets DMA transfer parameters including source address, destination address, and data length for DMA stream configuration
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Function performs hardware register configuration for DMA transfers: clears DBM bit, sets NDTR data length, and configures PAR/M0AR registers based on transfer direction. It is called from HAL_DMA_Start and HAL_DMA_Start_IT as part of DMA initialization/configuration. GetMMIOFunctionInfo returned empty list but function clearly contains MMIO operations (hdma->Instance->CR, NDTR, PAR, M0AR). This is an initialization function that sets up DMA hardware parameters without data transfer, interrupt handling, or polling loops.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：

### ETH_DMARxDescListInit

```text
=== ETH_DMARxDescListInit 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：2981
- 函数内容：static void ETH_DMARxDescListInit(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  ETH_DMADescTypeDef *dmarxdesc;
  uint32_t i;

  for (i = 0; i < (uint32_t)ETH_RX_DESC_CNT; i++)
  {
    dmarxdesc =  heth->Init.RxDesc + i;

    WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->DESC0, 0x0U);
    WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->DESC1, 0x0U);
    WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->DESC2, 0x0U);
    WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->DESC3, 0x0U);
    WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->BackupAddr0, 0x0U);
    WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->BackupAddr1, 0x0U);

    /* Set Own bit of the Rx descriptor Status */
    dmarxdesc->DESC0 = ETH_DMARXDESC_OWN;

    /* Set Buffer1 size and Second Address Chained bit */
    dmarxdesc->DESC1 = ETH_DMARXDESC_RCH | ETH_RX_BUF_SIZE;

    /* Enable Ethernet DMA Rx Descriptor interrupt */
    dmarxdesc->DESC1 &= ~ETH_DMARXDESC_DIC;

    /* Set Rx descritors addresses */
    WRITE_REG(heth->RxDescList.RxDesc[i], (uint32_t)dmarxdesc);

    if (i < ((uint32_t)ETH_RX_DESC_CNT - 1U))
    {
      WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->DESC3, (uint32_t)(heth->Init.RxDesc + i + 1U));
    }
    else
    {
      WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->DESC3, (uint32_t)(heth->Init.RxDesc));
    }
  }

  WRITE_REG(heth->RxDescList.RxDescIdx, 0U);
  WRITE_REG(heth->RxDescList.RxDescCnt, 0U);
  WRITE_REG(heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescIdx, 0U);
  WRITE_REG(heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescCnt, 0U);
  WRITE_REG(heth->RxDescList.ItMode, 0U);

  /* Set Receive Descriptor List Address */
  WRITE_REG(heth->Instance->DMARDLAR, (uint32_t) heth->Init.RxDesc);
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Initializes DMA Rx descriptors in chain mode for Ethernet reception, setting up descriptor chain linking and hardware registers.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Based on analysis using GetFunctionInfo and GetMMIOFunctionInfo: 1) This is a static function called by HAL_ETH_Init() for Ethernet driver initialization. 2) It contains multiple WRITE_REG operations (hardware register writes) to initialize DMA descriptors and set the DMA Receive Descriptor List Address Register (DMARDLAR). 3) It sets up descriptor chain linking for circular buffer operation. 4) It doesn't perform data reception/transmission (not RECV), doesn't handle interrupts (not IRQ), doesn't contain OS/kernel operations (not CORE), and doesn't have polling loops (not LOOP). 5) As an initialization function that sets up peripheral descriptors, it should be classified as INIT with hardware operations removed while preserving descriptor initialization logic.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：

    /* WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->BackupAddr1, 0x0U); */

    /* Set Own bit of the Rx descriptor Status */
    dmarxdesc->DESC0 = ETH_DMARXDESC_OWN;

    /* Set Buffer1 size and Second Address Chained bit */
    dmarxdesc->DESC1 = ETH_DMARXDESC_RCH | ETH_RX_BUF_SIZE;

    /* Enable Ethernet DMA Rx Descriptor interrupt */
    dmarxdesc->DESC1 &= ~ETH_DMARXDESC_DIC;

    /* Set Rx descriptors addresses - remove hardware write */
    /* WRITE_REG(heth->RxDescList.RxDesc[i], (uint32_t)dmarxdesc); */

    if (i < ((uint32_t)ETH_RX_DESC_CNT - 1U))
    {

      /* WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->DESC3, (uint32_t)(heth->Init.RxDesc + i + 1U)); */
    }

    {
      /* Remove hardware write, preserve circular buffer logic */

    }
  }

  /* Remove hardware register writes, preserve initialization state */

### ETH_DMATxDescListInit

```text
=== ETH_DMATxDescListInit 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：2935
- 函数内容：static void ETH_DMATxDescListInit(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  ETH_DMADescTypeDef *dmatxdesc;
  uint32_t i;

  /* Fill each DMATxDesc descriptor with the right values */
  for (i = 0; i < (uint32_t)ETH_TX_DESC_CNT; i++)
  {
    dmatxdesc = heth->Init.TxDesc + i;

    WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC0, 0x0U);
    WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC1, 0x0U);
    WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC2, 0x0U);
    WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC3, 0x0U);

    WRITE_REG(heth->TxDescList.TxDesc[i], (uint32_t)dmatxdesc);

    /* Set Second Address Chained bit */
    SET_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_TCH);

    if (i < ((uint32_t)ETH_TX_DESC_CNT - 1U))
    {
      WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC3, (uint32_t)(heth->Init.TxDesc + i + 1U));
    }
    else
    {
      WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC3, (uint32_t)(heth->Init.TxDesc));
    }

    /* Set the DMA Tx descriptors checksum insertion */
    SET_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_CHECKSUMTCPUDPICMPFULL);
  }

  heth->TxDescList.CurTxDesc = 0;

  /* Set Transmit Descriptor List Address */
  WRITE_REG(heth->Instance->DMATDLAR, (uint32_t) heth->Init.TxDesc);
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Initializes DMA Tx descriptors for Ethernet transmission by setting up descriptor fields and linking them in a chain.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function is an initialization function that sets up DMA Tx descriptors for Ethernet. Analysis shows: 1) It's called by HAL_ETH_Init() as part of Ethernet initialization sequence; 2) Contains multiple WRITE_REG operations to hardware registers (descriptor fields and DMATDLAR register); 3) Contains important state initialization (CurTxDesc = 0) that must be preserved; 4) Does not contain NVIC/OS kernel/VTOR operations (not CORE); 5) Not an interrupt handler, data transfer function, or polling loop. According to classification priority, INIT is the appropriate category for this hardware initialization function.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**
* @brief  Initializes the DMA Tx descriptors.
*         called by HAL_ETH_Init() API.
* @param  heth: pointer to a ETH_HandleTypeDef structure that contains
*         the configuration information for ETHERNET module
* @retval None
*/
static void ETH_DMATxDescListInit(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  ETH_DMADescTypeDef *dmatxdesc;
  uint32_t i;

  /* Fill each DMATxDesc descriptor with the right values */
  for (i = 0; i < (uint32_t)ETH_TX_DESC_CNT; i++)
  {
    dmatxdesc = heth->Init.TxDesc + i;

    /* Remove hardware register writes */
    /* WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC0, 0x0U); */
    /* WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC1, 0x0U); */
    /* WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC2, 0x0U); */
    /* WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC3, 0x0U); */

    /* Remove hardware register write */
    /* WRITE_REG(heth->TxDescList.TxDesc[i], (uint32_t)dmatxdesc); */

    /* Set Second Address Chained bit */
    /* SET_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_TCH); */

    if (i < ((uint32_t)ETH_TX_DESC_CNT - 1U))
    {
      /* Remove hardware register write */
      /* WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC3, (uint32_t)(heth->Init.TxDesc + i + 1U)); */
    }
    else
    {
      /* Remove hardware register write */
      /* WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC3, (uint32_t)(heth->Init.TxDesc)); */
    }

    /* Set the DMA Tx descriptors checksum insertion */
    /* SET_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_CHECKSUMTCPUDPICMPFULL); */
  }

  heth->TxDescList.CurTxDesc = 0;

  /* Remove hardware register write */
  /* WRITE_REG(heth->Instance->DMATDLAR, (uint32_t) heth->Init.TxDesc); */
}

### ETH_Prepare_Tx_Descriptors

```text
=== ETH_Prepare_Tx_Descriptors 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：3038
- 函数内容：static uint32_t ETH_Prepare_Tx_Descriptors(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth, ETH_TxPacketConfig *pTxConfig, uint32_t ItMode)
{
  ETH_TxDescListTypeDef *dmatxdesclist = &heth->TxDescList;
  uint32_t descidx = dmatxdesclist->CurTxDesc;
  uint32_t firstdescidx = dmatxdesclist->CurTxDesc;
  uint32_t idx;
  uint32_t descnbr = 0;
  ETH_DMADescTypeDef *dmatxdesc = (ETH_DMADescTypeDef *)dmatxdesclist->TxDesc[descidx];

  ETH_BufferTypeDef  *txbuffer = pTxConfig->TxBuffer;
  uint32_t           bd_count = 0;

  /* Current Tx Descriptor Owned by DMA: cannot be used by the application  */
  if ((READ_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_OWN) == ETH_DMATXDESC_OWN)
      || (dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[descidx] != NULL))
  {
    return HAL_ETH_ERROR_BUSY;
  }


  descnbr += 1U;

  /* Set header or buffer 1 address */
  WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC2, (uint32_t)txbuffer->buffer);

  /* Set header or buffer 1 Length */
  MODIFY_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC1, ETH_DMATXDESC_TBS1, txbuffer->len);

  if (READ_BIT(pTxConfig->Attributes, ETH_TX_PACKETS_FEATURES_CSUM) != 0U)
  {
    MODIFY_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_CIC, pTxConfig->ChecksumCtrl);
  }

  if (READ_BIT(pTxConfig->Attributes, ETH_TX_PACKETS_FEATURES_CRCPAD) != 0U)
  {
    MODIFY_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_CRC_PAD_DISABLE, pTxConfig->CRCPadCtrl);
  }


  if (READ_BIT(pTxConfig->Attributes, ETH_TX_PACKETS_FEATURES_VLANTAG) != 0U)
  {
    /* Set Vlan Type */
    SET_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_VF);
  }

  /* Mark it as First Descriptor */
  SET_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_FS);

  /* Ensure rest of descriptor is written to RAM before the OWN bit */
  __DMB();
  /* set OWN bit of FIRST descriptor */
  SET_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_OWN);

  /* only if the packet is split into more than one descriptors > 1 */
  while (txbuffer->next != NULL)
  {
    /* Clear the LD bit of previous descriptor */
    CLEAR_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_LS);
    if (ItMode != ((uint32_t)RESET))
    {
      /* Set Interrupt on completion bit */
      SET_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_IC);
    }
    else
    {
      /* Clear Interrupt on completion bit */
      CLEAR_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_IC);
    }
    /* Increment current tx descriptor index */
    INCR_TX_DESC_INDEX(descidx, 1U);
    /* Get current descriptor address */
    dmatxdesc = (ETH_DMADescTypeDef *)dmatxdesclist->TxDesc[descidx];

    /* Clear the FD bit of new Descriptor */
    CLEAR_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_FS);

    /* Current Tx Descriptor Owned by DMA: cannot be used by the application  */
    if ((READ_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_OWN) == ETH_DMATXDESC_OWN)
        || (dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[descidx] != NULL))
    {
      descidx = firstdescidx;
      dmatxdesc = (ETH_DMADescTypeDef *)dmatxdesclist->TxDesc[descidx];

      /* clear previous desc own bit */
      for (idx = 0; idx < descnbr; idx ++)
      {
        /* Ensure rest of descriptor is written to RAM before the OWN bit */
        __DMB();

        CLEAR_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_OWN);

        /* Increment current tx descriptor index */
        INCR_TX_DESC_INDEX(descidx, 1U);
        /* Get current descriptor address */
        dmatxdesc = (ETH_DMADescTypeDef *)dmatxdesclist->TxDesc[descidx];
      }

      return HAL_ETH_ERROR_BUSY;
    }

    descnbr += 1U;

    /* Get the next Tx buffer in the list */
    txbuffer = txbuffer->next;

    /* Set header or buffer 1 address */
    WRITE_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC2, (uint32_t)txbuffer->buffer);

    /* Set header or buffer 1 Length */
    MODIFY_REG(dmatxdesc->DESC1, ETH_DMATXDESC_TBS1, txbuffer->len);

    bd_count += 1U;

    /* Ensure rest of descriptor is written to RAM before the OWN bit */
    __DMB();
    /* Set Own bit */
    SET_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_OWN);
  }

  if (ItMode != ((uint32_t)RESET))
  {
    /* Set Interrupt on completion bit */
    SET_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_IC);
  }
  else
  {
    /* Clear Interrupt on completion bit */
    CLEAR_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_IC);
  }

  /* Mark it as LAST descriptor */
  SET_BIT(dmatxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMATXDESC_LS);
  /* Save the current packet address to expose it to the application */
  dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[descidx] = dmatxdesclist->CurrentPacketAddress;

  dmatxdesclist->CurTxDesc = descidx;
  /* disable the interrupt */
  __disable_irq();

  dmatxdesclist->BuffersInUse += bd_count + 1U;

  /* Enable interrupts back */
  __enable_irq();


  /* Return function status */
  return HAL_ETH_ERROR_NONE;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Prepares Tx DMA descriptors before transmission by configuring descriptor fields and managing buffer chains
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function is classified as INIT because it initializes and configures DMA descriptors for Ethernet transmission. Analysis shows: 1) It performs hardware-specific operations through WRITE_REG, MODIFY_REG, SET_BIT, and CLEAR_BIT macros that write to DMA descriptor registers (DESC0, DESC1, DESC2). 2) It sets up descriptor state including ownership bits (OWN), first/last segment flags (FS/LS), interrupt control (IC), VLAN flags (VF), and buffer addresses/lengths. 3) It manages descriptor indices and tracks buffer usage but the core purpose is hardware initialization. 4) It's called by HAL_ETH_Transmit and HAL_ETH_Transmit_IT to prepare descriptors before actual data transfer. 5) It's not CORE (no NVIC/OS operations), not RECV (transmission preparation), not IRQ (not an interrupt handler), and not LOOP (while loop processes buffer chains, not peripheral polling).

### ETH_SetDMAConfig

```text
=== ETH_SetDMAConfig 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：2792
- 函数内容：static void ETH_SetDMAConfig(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth,  ETH_DMAConfigTypeDef *dmaconf)
{
  uint32_t tmpreg1;

  /*----------------------- ETHERNET DMAOMR Configuration --------------------*/
  /* Get the ETHERNET DMAOMR value */
  tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->DMAOMR;
  /* Clear xx bits */
  tmpreg1 &= ETH_DMAOMR_CLEAR_MASK;

  tmpreg1 |= (uint32_t)(((uint32_t)((dmaconf->DropTCPIPChecksumErrorFrame == DISABLE) ? 1U : 0U) << 26U) |
                        ((uint32_t)dmaconf->ReceiveStoreForward << 25U) |
                        ((uint32_t)((dmaconf->FlushRxPacket == DISABLE) ? 1U : 0U) << 20U) |
                        ((uint32_t)dmaconf->TransmitStoreForward << 21U) |
                        dmaconf->TransmitThresholdControl |
                        ((uint32_t)dmaconf->ForwardErrorFrames << 7U) |
                        ((uint32_t)dmaconf->ForwardUndersizedGoodFrames << 6U) |
                        dmaconf->ReceiveThresholdControl |
                        ((uint32_t)dmaconf->SecondFrameOperate << 2U));

  /* Write to ETHERNET DMAOMR */
  (heth->Instance)->DMAOMR = (uint32_t)tmpreg1;

  /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account:
  at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
  tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->DMAOMR;
  HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
  (heth->Instance)->DMAOMR = tmpreg1;

  /*----------------------- ETHERNET DMABMR Configuration --------------------*/
  (heth->Instance)->DMABMR = (uint32_t)(((uint32_t)dmaconf->AddressAlignedBeats << 25U) |
                                        dmaconf->BurstMode |
                                        dmaconf->RxDMABurstLength | /* !! if 4xPBL is selected for Tx or
                                                                       Rx it is applied for the other */
                                        dmaconf->TxDMABurstLength |
                                        ((uint32_t)dmaconf->EnhancedDescriptorFormat << 7U) |
                                        (dmaconf->DescriptorSkipLength << 2U) |
                                        dmaconf->DMAArbitration |
                                        ETH_DMABMR_USP); /* Enable use of separate PBL for Rx and Tx */

  /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account:
     at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
  tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->DMABMR;
  HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
  (heth->Instance)->DMABMR = tmpreg1;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Configures Ethernet DMA controller parameters including arbitration, burst modes, store-and-forward settings, and threshold controls
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function performs hardware initialization of Ethernet DMA registers (DMAOMR and DMABMR). It reads from and writes to hardware registers to configure DMA operational parameters, and includes HAL_Delay calls to wait for register writes to take effect. The function is called by HAL_ETH_SetDMAConfig and ETH_MACDMAConfig during Ethernet initialization. It fits the INIT classification as it configures peripheral hardware without involving data transmission, interrupt handling, or status polling loops. GetMMIOFunctionInfo confirms hardware register accesses, and GetFunctionInfo shows direct manipulation of DMAOMR and DMABMR registers.

### ETH_SetMACConfig

```text
=== ETH_SetMACConfig 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：2735
- 函数内容：static void ETH_SetMACConfig(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth,  ETH_MACConfigTypeDef *macconf)
{
  uint32_t tmpreg1;

  /*------------------------ ETHERNET MACCR Configuration --------------------*/
  /* Get the ETHERNET MACCR value */
  tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACCR;
  /* Clear WD, PCE, PS, TE and RE bits */
  tmpreg1 &= ETH_MACCR_CLEAR_MASK;

  tmpreg1 |= (uint32_t)(((uint32_t)((macconf->Watchdog == DISABLE) ? 1U : 0U) << 23U) |
                        ((uint32_t)((macconf->Jabber == DISABLE) ? 1U : 0U) << 22U) |
                        (uint32_t)macconf->InterPacketGapVal |
                        ((uint32_t)macconf->CarrierSenseDuringTransmit << 16U) |
                        macconf->Speed |
                        ((uint32_t)((macconf->ReceiveOwn == DISABLE) ? 1U : 0U) << 13U) |
                        ((uint32_t)macconf->LoopbackMode << 12U) |
                        macconf->DuplexMode |
                        ((uint32_t)macconf->ChecksumOffload << 10U) |
                        ((uint32_t)((macconf->RetryTransmission == DISABLE) ? 1U : 0U) << 9U) |
                        ((uint32_t)macconf->AutomaticPadCRCStrip << 7U) |
                        macconf->BackOffLimit |
                        ((uint32_t)macconf->DeferralCheck << 4U));

  /* Write to ETHERNET MACCR */
  (heth->Instance)->MACCR = (uint32_t)tmpreg1;

  /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account :
  at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
  tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACCR;
  HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
  (heth->Instance)->MACCR = tmpreg1;

  /*----------------------- ETHERNET MACFCR Configuration --------------------*/

  /* Get the ETHERNET MACFCR value */
  tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACFCR;
  /* Clear xx bits */
  tmpreg1 &= ETH_MACFCR_CLEAR_MASK;

  tmpreg1 |= (uint32_t)((macconf->PauseTime << 16U) |
                        ((uint32_t)((macconf->ZeroQuantaPause == DISABLE) ? 1U : 0U) << 7U) |
                        macconf->PauseLowThreshold |
                        ((uint32_t)((macconf->UnicastPausePacketDetect == ENABLE) ? 1U : 0U) << 3U) |
                        ((uint32_t)((macconf->ReceiveFlowControl == ENABLE) ? 1U : 0U) << 2U) |
                        ((uint32_t)((macconf->TransmitFlowControl == ENABLE) ? 1U : 0U) << 1U));

  /* Write to ETHERNET MACFCR */
  (heth->Instance)->MACFCR = (uint32_t)tmpreg1;

  /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account :
  at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
  tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACFCR;
  HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
  (heth->Instance)->MACFCR = tmpreg1;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Configures Ethernet MAC control registers (MACCR and MACFCR) with specified parameters including speed, duplex mode, flow control, and other MAC settings.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：The function performs hardware register configuration for Ethernet MAC settings. It reads from and writes to MACCR and MACFCR registers, contains HAL_Delay calls for register write synchronization, and configures various MAC parameters like watchdog, jabber, speed, duplex mode, flow control, etc. This matches the INIT classification criteria as it initializes/configures peripheral hardware registers. The function is static and called by HAL_ETH_SetMACConfig and ETH_MACDMAConfig for MAC configuration setup. GetMMIOFunctionInfo showed no specific MMIO expressions but the source code clearly shows hardware register accesses. The replacement removes all hardware-specific operations while preserving the function signature.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```

}

### ETH_UpdateDescriptor

```text
=== ETH_UpdateDescriptor 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：1194
- 函数内容：static void ETH_UpdateDescriptor(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  uint32_t tailidx;
  uint32_t descidx;
  uint32_t desccount;
  ETH_DMADescTypeDef *dmarxdesc;
  uint8_t *buff = NULL;
  uint8_t allocStatus = 1U;

  descidx = heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescIdx;
  dmarxdesc = (ETH_DMADescTypeDef *)heth->RxDescList.RxDesc[descidx];
  desccount = heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescCnt;

  while ((desccount > 0U) && (allocStatus != 0U))
  {
    /* Check if a buffer's attached the descriptor */
    if (READ_REG(dmarxdesc->BackupAddr0) == 0U)
    {
      /* Get a new buffer. */
#if (USE_HAL_ETH_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
      /*Call registered Allocate callback*/
      heth->rxAllocateCallback(&buff);
#else
      /* Allocate callback */
      HAL_ETH_RxAllocateCallback(&buff);
#endif  /* USE_HAL_ETH_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
      if (buff == NULL)
      {
        allocStatus = 0U;
      }
      else
      {
        WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->BackupAddr0, (uint32_t)buff);
        WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->DESC2, (uint32_t)buff);
      }
    }

    if (allocStatus != 0U)
    {
      if (heth->RxDescList.ItMode == 0U)
      {
        WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->DESC1, ETH_DMARXDESC_DIC | ETH_RX_BUF_SIZE | ETH_DMARXDESC_RCH);
      }
      else
      {
        WRITE_REG(dmarxdesc->DESC1, ETH_RX_BUF_SIZE | ETH_DMARXDESC_RCH);
      }

      SET_BIT(dmarxdesc->DESC0, ETH_DMARXDESC_OWN);

      /* Increment current rx descriptor index */
      INCR_RX_DESC_INDEX(descidx, 1U);
      /* Get current descriptor address */
      dmarxdesc = (ETH_DMADescTypeDef *)heth->RxDescList.RxDesc[descidx];
      desccount--;
    }
  }

  if (heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescCnt != desccount)
  {
    /* Set the tail pointer index */
    tailidx = (descidx + 1U) % ETH_RX_DESC_CNT;

    /* DMB instruction to avoid race condition */
    __DMB();

    /* Set the Tail pointer address */
    WRITE_REG(heth->Instance->DMARPDR, ((uint32_t)(heth->Init.RxDesc + (tailidx))));

    heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescIdx = descidx;
    heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescCnt = desccount;
  }
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Updates Ethernet Rx DMA descriptors by allocating buffers, configuring descriptor fields, and setting up DMA hardware for packet reception
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function is classified as INIT because it performs hardware initialization and configuration operations for Ethernet DMA descriptors. Analysis shows: 1) It contains multiple MMIO operations (READ_REG/WRITE_REG/SET_BIT) accessing descriptor fields and DMA registers; 2) It allocates buffers and configures descriptor control fields (DESC0, DESC1, DESC2); 3) It updates DMA tail pointer register (DMARPDR) for hardware DMA operation; 4) It's called from initialization functions like HAL_ETH_Start and HAL_ETH_Start_IT; 5) It prepares the hardware for future data reception by setting up descriptor rings and buffer management. The function fits the INIT category as it initializes/updates hardware descriptors rather than performing actual data reception (RECV) or interrupt handling (IRQ).
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
static void ETH_UpdateDescriptor(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  uint32_t tailidx;
  uint32_t descidx;
  uint32_t desccount;
  ETH_DMADescTypeDef *dmarxdesc;
  uint8_t *buff = NULL;
  uint8_t allocStatus = 1U;

  descidx = heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescIdx;
  dmarxdesc = (ETH_DMADescTypeDef *)heth->RxDescList.RxDesc[descidx];
  desccount = heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescCnt;

  while ((desccount > 0U) && (allocStatus != 0U))
  {
    /* Check if a buffer's attached the descriptor */
    if (dmarxdesc->BackupAddr0 == 0U)
    {
      /* Get a new buffer. */
#if (USE_HAL_ETH_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
      /*Call registered Allocate callback*/
      heth->rxAllocateCallback(&buff);
#else
      /* Allocate callback */
      HAL_ETH_RxAllocateCallback(&buff);
#endif  /* USE_HAL_ETH_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */
      if (buff == NULL)
      {
        allocStatus = 0U;
      }
      else
      {
        dmarxdesc->BackupAddr0 = (uint32_t)buff;
        dmarxdesc->DESC2 = (uint32_t)buff;
      }
    }

    if (allocStatus != 0U)
    {
      if (heth->RxDescList.ItMode == 0U)
      {
        dmarxdesc->DESC1 = ETH_DMARXDESC_DIC | ETH_RX_BUF_SIZE | ETH_DMARXDESC_RCH;
      }
      else
      {
        dmarxdesc->DESC1 = ETH_RX_BUF_SIZE | ETH_DMARXDESC_RCH;
      }

      dmarxdesc->DESC0 |= ETH_DMARXDESC_OWN;

      /* Increment current rx descriptor index */
      INCR_RX_DESC_INDEX(descidx, 1U);
      /* Get current descriptor address */
      dmarxdesc = (ETH_DMADescTypeDef *)heth->RxDescList.RxDesc[descidx];
      desccount--;
    }
  }

  if (heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescCnt != desccount)
  {
    /* Set the tail pointer index */
    tailidx = (descidx + 1U) % ETH_RX_DESC_CNT;

    /* DMB instruction to avoid race condition */
    __DMB();

    heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescCnt = desccount;
  }
}

### FLASH_Erase_Sector

```text
=== FLASH_Erase_Sector 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash_ex.c
- 行号：980
- 函数内容：void FLASH_Erase_Sector(uint32_t Sector, uint8_t VoltageRange)
{
  uint32_t tmp_psize = 0U;

  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_SECTOR(Sector));
  assert_param(IS_VOLTAGERANGE(VoltageRange));

  if (VoltageRange == FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_1)
  {
    tmp_psize = FLASH_PSIZE_BYTE;
  }
  else if (VoltageRange == FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_2)
  {
    tmp_psize = FLASH_PSIZE_HALF_WORD;
  }
  else if (VoltageRange == FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_3)
  {
    tmp_psize = FLASH_PSIZE_WORD;
  }
  else
  {
    tmp_psize = FLASH_PSIZE_DOUBLE_WORD;
  }

  /* If the previous operation is completed, proceed to erase the sector */
  CLEAR_BIT(FLASH->CR, FLASH_CR_PSIZE);
  FLASH->CR |= tmp_psize;
  CLEAR_BIT(FLASH->CR, FLASH_CR_SNB);
  FLASH->CR |= FLASH_CR_SER | (Sector << FLASH_CR_SNB_Pos);
  FLASH->CR |= FLASH_CR_STRT;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Erases a specified FLASH memory sector by configuring the FLASH control registers based on voltage range parameters
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：GetFunctionInfo revealed that FLASH_Erase_Sector performs direct hardware register writes to FLASH->CR to initiate FLASH erase operations. GetMMIOFunctionInfo confirmed hardware register accesses (though no detailed expressions were returned, the function body shows CLEAR_BIT and |= operations on FLASH->CR). GetStructOrEnumInfo showed FLASH_TypeDef structure with CR member. GetFunctionCallStack revealed it's called by HAL_FLASHEx_Erase, HAL_FLASHEx_Erase_IT, and HAL_FLASH_IRQHandler. The function fits the INIT category because it initializes/triggers a hardware operation (FLASH sector erase) by configuring control registers. It doesn't involve data transmission (not RECV), isn't an interrupt handler (not IRQ), contains no polling loops (not LOOP), and isn't core OS/NVIC functionality (not CORE).
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**
* @brief  Erase the specified FLASH memory sector
* @param  Sector FLASH sector to erase
*         The value of this parameter depend on device used within the same series
* @param  VoltageRange The device voltage range which defines the erase parallelism.
*          This parameter can be one of the following values:
*            @arg FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_1: when the device voltage range is 1.8V to 2.1V,
*                                  the operation will be done by byte (8-bit)
*            @arg FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_2: when the device voltage range is 2.1V to 2.7V,
*                                  the operation will be done by half word (16-bit)
*            @arg FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_3: when the device voltage range is 2.7V to 3.6V,
*                                  the operation will be done by word (32-bit)
*            @arg FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_4: when the device voltage range is 2.7V to 3.6V + External Vpp,
*                                  the operation will be done by double word (64-bit)
*
* @retval None
*/
void FLASH_Erase_Sector(uint32_t Sector, uint8_t VoltageRange)
{
  uint32_t tmp_psize = 0U;

  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_SECTOR(Sector));
  assert_param(IS_VOLTAGERANGE(VoltageRange));

  if (VoltageRange == FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_1)
  {
    tmp_psize = FLASH_PSIZE_BYTE;
  }
  else if (VoltageRange == FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_2)
  {
    tmp_psize = FLASH_PSIZE_HALF_WORD;
  }
  else if (VoltageRange == FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_3)
  {
    tmp_psize = FLASH_PSIZE_WORD;
  }
  else
  {
    tmp_psize = FLASH_PSIZE_DOUBLE_WORD;
  }

  /* Skip hardware-specific FLASH erase initiation */
  /* Original hardware operations removed for simulation:
   * CLEAR_BIT(FLASH->CR, FLASH_CR_PSIZE);
   * FLASH->CR |= tmp_psize;
   * CLEAR_BIT(FLASH->CR, FLASH_CR_SNB);
   * FLASH->CR |= FLASH_CR_SER | (Sector << FLASH_CR_SNB_Pos);
   * FLASH->CR |= FLASH_CR_STRT;
   */
}
```

=== 信息结束 ===
```

### FLASH_FlushCaches

```text
=== FLASH_FlushCaches 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash_ex.c
- 行号：1309
- 函数内容：void FLASH_FlushCaches(void)
{
  /* Flush instruction cache  */
  if (READ_BIT(FLASH->ACR, FLASH_ACR_ICEN) != RESET)
  {
    /* Disable instruction cache  */
    __HAL_FLASH_INSTRUCTION_CACHE_DISABLE();
    /* Reset instruction cache */
    __HAL_FLASH_INSTRUCTION_CACHE_RESET();
    /* Enable instruction cache */
    __HAL_FLASH_INSTRUCTION_CACHE_ENABLE();
  }

  /* Flush data cache */
  if (READ_BIT(FLASH->ACR, FLASH_ACR_DCEN) != RESET)
  {
    /* Disable data cache  */
    __HAL_FLASH_DATA_CACHE_DISABLE();
    /* Reset data cache */
    __HAL_FLASH_DATA_CACHE_RESET();
    /* Enable data cache */
    __HAL_FLASH_DATA_CACHE_ENABLE();
  }
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Flushes the instruction and data caches of the FLASH peripheral by disabling, resetting, and re-enabling them if they are currently enabled.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：GetFunctionInfo revealed the function performs FLASH cache management operations. GetMMIOFunctionInfo identified multiple MMIO operations accessing FLASH->ACR register and cache control macros. GetFunctionCallStack shows it's called from HAL_FLASHEx_Erase and HAL_FLASH_IRQHandler during flash operations. The function performs initialization/configuration of cache states (disable-reset-enable sequence) which is characteristic of INIT functions. It's not CORE (no NVIC/OS/VTOR operations), not RECV (no data I/O), not IRQ (not an interrupt handler), and not LOOP (no polling loops). While it could be considered RETURNOK, the cache flushing operation sequence makes INIT more appropriate as it ensures proper cache state initialization.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**
* @brief  Flush the instruction and data caches
* @retval None
*/
void FLASH_FlushCaches(void)
{
  /* In simulation, cache flushing is not needed */
  /* Original hardware operations removed for simulation */
}
```

### FLASH_MassErase

```text
=== FLASH_MassErase 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash_ex.c
- 行号：951
- 函数内容：static void FLASH_MassErase(uint8_t VoltageRange, uint32_t Banks)
{
  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_VOLTAGERANGE(VoltageRange));
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_BANK(Banks));

  /* If the previous operation is completed, proceed to erase all sectors */
  CLEAR_BIT(FLASH->CR, FLASH_CR_PSIZE);
  FLASH->CR |= FLASH_CR_MER;
  FLASH->CR |= FLASH_CR_STRT | ((uint32_t)VoltageRange << 8U);
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Configures FLASH control registers to initiate a mass erase operation of FLASH memory based on voltage range and bank selection.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：The function performs hardware initialization/configuration by writing to FLASH peripheral control registers (FLASH->CR) to set up mass erase operation. It clears PSIZE bits, sets MER (Mass ERase) bit, and configures STRT bit with voltage range. This is a classic INIT function that sets up peripheral hardware for an operation. The function is static and called by higher-level HAL functions HAL_FLASHEx_Erase and HAL_FLASHEx_Erase_IT. It contains direct MMIO operations but no data transfer, interrupt handling, or polling loops.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**
* @brief  Mass erase of FLASH memory
* @param  VoltageRange The device voltage range which defines the erase parallelism.
*          This parameter can be one of the following values:
*            @arg FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_1: when the device voltage range is 1.8V to 2.1V,
*                                  the operation will be done by byte (8-bit)
*            @arg FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_2: when the device voltage range is 2.1V to 2.7V,
*                                  the operation will be done by half word (16-bit)
*            @arg FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_3: when the device voltage range is 2.7V to 3.6V,
*                                  the operation will be done by word (32-bit)
*            @arg FLASH_VOLTAGE_RANGE_4: when the device voltage range is 2.7V to 3.6V + External Vpp,
*                                  the operation will be done by double word (64-bit)
*
* @param  Banks Banks to be erased
*          This parameter can be one of the following values:
*            @arg FLASH_BANK_1: Bank1 to be erased
*
* @retval None
*/
static void FLASH_MassErase(uint8_t VoltageRange, uint32_t Banks)
{
  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_VOLTAGERANGE(VoltageRange));
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_BANK(Banks));

  /* Skip hardware-specific configuration for mass erase */
  /* Original hardware operations removed:
   * CLEAR_BIT(FLASH->CR, FLASH_CR_PSIZE);
   * FLASH->CR |= FLASH_CR_MER;
   * FLASH->CR |= FLASH_CR_STRT | ((uint32_t)VoltageRange << 8U);
   */
}

### FLASH_Program_Byte

```text
=== FLASH_Program_Byte 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash.c
- 行号：694
- 函数内容：static void FLASH_Program_Byte(uint32_t Address, uint8_t Data)
{
  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_ADDRESS(Address));
  
  /* If the previous operation is completed, proceed to program the new data */
  CLEAR_BIT(FLASH->CR, FLASH_CR_PSIZE);
  FLASH->CR |= FLASH_PSIZE_BYTE;
  FLASH->CR |= FLASH_CR_PG;

  *(__IO uint8_t*)Address = Data;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：SKIP
- 函数用途/功能描述：Programs a single byte (8-bit) to a specified flash memory address by configuring the flash controller and performing the write operation.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：FLASH_Program_Byte is a static helper function that performs direct flash memory programming operations. It accesses FLASH->CR control register to configure byte programming mode and enables programming, then writes data directly to the specified memory address. This is a hardware-specific flash programming operation that can be safely skipped in simulation since we don't have actual flash hardware. The function is called by higher-level functions HAL_FLASH_Program and HAL_FLASH_Program_IT. It preserves parameter validation (assert_param) but removes all hardware register accesses and memory writes. Classification as SKIP is appropriate because: 1) It's not CORE (no NVIC/OS/VTOR operations), 2) Not RECV (not receiving data), 3) Not IRQ (not interrupt handler), 4) Not INIT (not initialization, though it configures registers), 5) Not LOOP (no polling loops), 6) Not RETURNOK (returns void, not a status). SKIP fits best as it's a non-critical driver function in simulation context that can be safely ignored.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```

### FLASH_Program_DoubleWord

```text
=== FLASH_Program_DoubleWord 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash.c
- 行号：610
- 函数内容：static void FLASH_Program_DoubleWord(uint32_t Address, uint64_t Data)
{
  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_ADDRESS(Address));
  
  /* If the previous operation is completed, proceed to program the new data */
  CLEAR_BIT(FLASH->CR, FLASH_CR_PSIZE);
  FLASH->CR |= FLASH_PSIZE_DOUBLE_WORD;
  FLASH->CR |= FLASH_CR_PG;

  /* Program first word */
  *(__IO uint32_t*)Address = (uint32_t)Data;

  /* Barrier to ensure programming is performed in 2 steps, in right order
    (independently of compiler optimization behavior) */
  __ISB();

  /* Program second word */
  *(__IO uint32_t*)(Address+4) = (uint32_t)(Data >> 32);
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Programs a 64-bit (double word) value to a specified flash memory address by configuring flash control registers and performing flash programming operations.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Function is classified as INIT because it performs hardware initialization and configuration operations for flash memory programming. The function accesses FLASH peripheral control registers (FLASH->CR) to set programming size and enable programming, then writes data to flash memory addresses. These are hardware-specific operations that need to be replaced in simulation. The function is called by HAL_FLASH_Program and HAL_FLASH_Program_IT, indicating it's part of flash driver initialization/programming flow. It's not CORE (no NVIC/OS operations), not RECV (no data reception), not IRQ (not an interrupt handler), and contains no polling loops (not LOOP).
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**\n* @brief  Program a double word (64-bit) at a specified address.\n* @note   This function must be used when the device voltage range is from\n*         2.7V to 3.6V and Vpp in the range 7V to 9V.\n*\n* @note   If an erase and a program operations are requested simultaneously,\n*         the erase operation is performed before the program one.\n*\n* @param  Address specifies the address to be programmed.\n* @param  Data specifies the data to be programmed.\n* @retval None\n*/\nstatic void FLASH_Program_DoubleWord(uint32_t Address, uint64_t Data)\n{\n  /* Check the parameters */\n  assert_param(IS_FLASH_ADDRESS(Address));\n  \n  /* Skip hardware-specific flash programming operations */\n  /* Original hardware operations removed for simulation:\n   * CLEAR_BIT(FLASH->CR, FLASH_CR_PSIZE);\n   * FLASH->CR |= FLASH_PSIZE_DOUBLE_WORD;\n   * FLASH->CR |= FLASH_CR_PG;\n   * *(__IO uint32_t*)Address = (uint32_t)Data;\n   * __ISB();\n   * *(__IO uint32_t*)(Address+4) = (uint32_t)(Data >> 32);\n   */\n  \n  /* In simulation, we assume the flash programming succeeds */\n  /* No actual hardware operations performed */\n}

### FLASH_WaitForLastOperation

```text
=== FLASH_WaitForLastOperation 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash.c
- 行号：550
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef FLASH_WaitForLastOperation(uint32_t Timeout)
{ 
  uint32_t tickstart = 0U;
  
  /* Clear Error Code */
  pFlash.ErrorCode = HAL_FLASH_ERROR_NONE;
  
  /* Wait for the FLASH operation to complete by polling on BUSY flag to be reset.
     Even if the FLASH operation fails, the BUSY flag will be reset and an error
     flag will be set */
  /* Get tick */
  tickstart = HAL_GetTick();

  while(__HAL_FLASH_GET_FLAG(FLASH_FLAG_BSY) != RESET) 
  { 
    if(Timeout != HAL_MAX_DELAY)
    {
      if((Timeout == 0U)||((HAL_GetTick() - tickstart ) > Timeout))
      {
        return HAL_TIMEOUT;
      }
    } 
  }

  /* Check FLASH End of Operation flag  */
  if (__HAL_FLASH_GET_FLAG(FLASH_FLAG_EOP) != RESET)
  {
    /* Clear FLASH End of Operation pending bit */
    __HAL_FLASH_CLEAR_FLAG(FLASH_FLAG_EOP);
  }
#if defined(FLASH_SR_RDERR)  
  if(__HAL_FLASH_GET_FLAG((FLASH_FLAG_OPERR | FLASH_FLAG_WRPERR | FLASH_FLAG_PGAERR | \
                           FLASH_FLAG_PGPERR | FLASH_FLAG_PGSERR | FLASH_FLAG_RDERR)) != RESET)
#else
  if(__HAL_FLASH_GET_FLAG((FLASH_FLAG_OPERR | FLASH_FLAG_WRPERR | FLASH_FLAG_PGAERR | \
                           FLASH_FLAG_PGPERR | FLASH_FLAG_PGSERR)) != RESET)
#endif /* FLASH_SR_RDERR */
  {
    /*Save the error code*/
    FLASH_SetErrorCode();
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }

  /* If there is no error flag set */
  return HAL_OK;
  
}  


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：LOOP
- 函数用途/功能描述：Waits for a FLASH operation to complete by polling the BUSY flag and checking for error flags
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function is classified as LOOP because its primary purpose is to wait in a polling loop for hardware status flags (BUSY flag) to be reset. GetMMIOFunctionInfo revealed multiple hardware register accesses including __HAL_FLASH_GET_FLAG calls for status checking and __HAL_FLASH_CLEAR_FLAG for flag clearing. The function contains a while loop that depends on peripheral hardware status (FLASH_FLAG_BSY), which fits the LOOP classification criteria. The function also performs error checking and updates global error state (pFlash.ErrorCode), but the core hardware-dependent polling loop is the dominant characteristic. This is not CORE (no NVIC/OS/VTOR operations), not RECV (no data I/O), not IRQ (not an interrupt handler), and not INIT (not initializing hardware).
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**
* @brief  Wait for a FLASH operation to complete.
* @param  Timeout maximum flash operationtimeout
* @retval HAL Status
*/
HAL_StatusTypeDef FLASH_WaitForLastOperation(uint32_t Timeout)
{ 
  /* Clear Error Code */
  pFlash.ErrorCode = HAL_FLASH_ERROR_NONE;
  
  /* [LOOP REMOVED] Skip waiting for hardware BUSY flag - assume operation complete */
  
  /* [LOOP REMOVED] Skip checking FLASH End of Operation flag */
  
  /* [LOOP REMOVED] Skip checking error flags - assume no errors */
  
  /* If there is no error flag set */
  return HAL_OK;
  
}
```

{
  GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_Init_Structure;
    
  /* Enable FSMC clock */
  __FSMC_CLK_ENABLE();

  /* Enable GPIOs clock */
  __GPIOD_CLK_ENABLE();
  __GPIOE_CLK_ENABLE();
  __GPIOF_CLK_ENABLE();
  __GPIOG_CLK_ENABLE();
  
  /* Common GPIO configuration */
  GPIO_Init_Structure.Mode      = GPIO_MODE_AF_PP;
  GPIO_Init_Structure.Pull      = GPIO_PULLUP;
  GPIO_Init_Structure.Speed     = GPIO_SPEED_HIGH;
  GPIO_Init_Structure.Alternate = GPIO_AF12_FSMC;
  
  /* GPIOD configuration */
  GPIO_Init_Structure.Pin   = GPIO_PIN_0 | GPIO_PIN_1 | GPIO_PIN_4 | GPIO_PIN_5 | GPIO_PIN_8     |\
                              GPIO_PIN_9 | GPIO_PIN_10 | GPIO_PIN_11 | GPIO_PIN_12 | GPIO_PIN_13 |\
                              GPIO_PIN_14 | GPIO_PIN_15;
   
  HAL_GPIO_Init(GPIOD, &GPIO_Init_Structure);

  /* GPIOE configuration */

                              GPIO_PIN_8 | GPIO_PIN_9 | GPIO_PIN_10 | GPIO_PIN_11 | GPIO_PIN_12 |\
                              GPIO_PIN_13 | GPIO_PIN_14 | GPIO_PIN_15;
  HAL_GPIO_Init(GPIOE, &GPIO_Init_Structure);
  
  /* GPIOF configuration */  
  GPIO_Init_Structure.Pin   = GPIO_PIN_0 | GPIO_PIN_1 | GPIO_PIN_2| GPIO_PIN_3 | GPIO_PIN_4     |\
                              GPIO_PIN_5 | GPIO_PIN_12 | GPIO_PIN_13 | GPIO_PIN_14 | GPIO_PIN_15;
  HAL_GPIO_Init(GPIOF, &GPIO_Init_Structure);
  
  /* GPIOG configuration */  
  GPIO_Init_Structure.Pin   = GPIO_PIN_0 | GPIO_PIN_1 | GPIO_PIN_2| GPIO_PIN_3 | GPIO_PIN_4     |\
                              GPIO_PIN_5 | GPIO_PIN_10;
  
  HAL_GPIO_Init(GPIOG, &GPIO_Init_Structure);  
}

### FSMC_NORSRAM_DeInit

```text
=== FSMC_NORSRAM_DeInit 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_ll_fsmc.c
- 行号：342
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef FSMC_NORSRAM_DeInit(FSMC_NORSRAM_TypeDef *Device,
                                     FSMC_NORSRAM_EXTENDED_TypeDef *ExDevice, uint32_t Bank)
{
  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_DEVICE(Device));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_EXTENDED_DEVICE(ExDevice));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK(Bank));

  /* Disable the FSMC_NORSRAM device */
  __FSMC_NORSRAM_DISABLE(Device, Bank);

  /* De-initialize the FSMC_NORSRAM device */
  /* FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1 */
  if (Bank == FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1)
  {
    Device->BTCR[Bank] = 0x000030DBU;
  }
  /* FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK2, FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK3 or FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK4 */
  else
  {
    Device->BTCR[Bank] = 0x000030D2U;
  }

  Device->BTCR[Bank + 1U] = 0x0FFFFFFFU;
  ExDevice->BWTR[Bank]   = 0x0FFFFFFFU;

  return HAL_OK;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：De-initializes the FSMC NORSRAM peripheral by disabling it and resetting configuration registers to default values
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function performs hardware de-initialization operations similar to initialization functions. It writes to peripheral registers (Device->BTCR and ExDevice->BWTR) to reset the FSMC NORSRAM configuration. GetMMIOFunctionInfo shows hardware register accesses, and GetFunctionInfo confirms direct register writes. The function follows the INIT pattern: it configures hardware to a known state (disabled/reset state) but doesn't involve data transfer, interrupts, or polling loops. According to the classification priority, INIT is appropriate as it's not CORE (no NVIC/OS operations), not RECV (no data I/O), not IRQ (not an interrupt handler), and not LOOP (no polling).
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**\n* @brief  DeInitialize the FSMC_NORSRAM peripheral\n* @param  Device Pointer to NORSRAM device instance\n* @param  ExDevice Pointer to NORSRAM extended mode device instance\n* @param  Bank NORSRAM bank number\n* @retval HAL status\n*/\nHAL_StatusTypeDef FSMC_NORSRAM_DeInit(FSMC_NORSRAM_TypeDef *Device,\n                                     FSMC_NORSRAM_EXTENDED_TypeDef *ExDevice, uint32_t Bank)\n{\n  /* Check the parameters */\n  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_DEVICE(Device));\n  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_EXTENDED_DEVICE(ExDevice));\n  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK(Bank));\n\n  /* Skip hardware-specific de-initialization */\n  /* Original hardware operations removed:\n   * __FSMC_NORSRAM_DISABLE(Device, Bank);\n   * Device->BTCR[Bank] = 0x000030DBU or 0x000030D2U;\n   * Device->BTCR[Bank + 1U] = 0x0FFFFFFFU;\n   * ExDevice->BWTR[Bank] = 0x0FFFFFFFU;\n   */\n\n  return HAL_OK;\n}

### FSMC_NORSRAM_Extended_Timing_Init

```text
=== FSMC_NORSRAM_Extended_Timing_Init 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_ll_fsmc.c
- 行号：431
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef FSMC_NORSRAM_Extended_Timing_Init(FSMC_NORSRAM_EXTENDED_TypeDef *Device,
                                                   FSMC_NORSRAM_TimingTypeDef *Timing, uint32_t Bank,
                                                   uint32_t ExtendedMode)
{
  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_EXTENDED_MODE(ExtendedMode));

  /* Set NORSRAM device timing register for write configuration, if extended mode is used */
  if (ExtendedMode == FSMC_EXTENDED_MODE_ENABLE)
  {
    /* Check the parameters */
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_EXTENDED_DEVICE(Device));
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_ADDRESS_SETUP_TIME(Timing->AddressSetupTime));
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_ADDRESS_HOLD_TIME(Timing->AddressHoldTime));
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_DATASETUP_TIME(Timing->DataSetupTime));
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_TURNAROUND_TIME(Timing->BusTurnAroundDuration));
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_ACCESS_MODE(Timing->AccessMode));
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK(Bank));

    /* Set NORSRAM device timing register for write configuration, if extended mode is used */
    MODIFY_REG(Device->BWTR[Bank], BWTR_CLEAR_MASK, (Timing->AddressSetupTime                                    |
                                                     ((Timing->AddressHoldTime)        << FSMC_BWTR1_ADDHLD_Pos)  |
                                                     ((Timing->DataSetupTime)          << FSMC_BWTR1_DATAST_Pos)  |
                                                     Timing->AccessMode                                          |
                                                     ((Timing->BusTurnAroundDuration)  << FSMC_BWTR1_BUSTURN_Pos)));
  }
  else
  {
    Device->BWTR[Bank] = 0x0FFFFFFFU;
  }

  return HAL_OK;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Initializes FSMC NOR/SRAM extended mode timing configuration according to specified parameters
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function configures FSMC (Flexible Static Memory Controller) timing registers for NOR/SRAM extended mode. It contains hardware register writes (MODIFY_REG and direct register assignment) to set up timing parameters like address setup time, data setup time, bus turnaround duration, etc. The function is called from HAL_SRAM_Init during SRAM initialization. It fits the INIT category as it performs peripheral configuration initialization with MMIO operations that need to be removed in the replacement while preserving parameter validation and returning success status.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**
* @brief  Initialize the FSMC_NORSRAM Extended mode Timing according to the specified
*         parameters in the FSMC_NORSRAM_TimingTypeDef
* @param  Device Pointer to NORSRAM device instance
* @param  Timing Pointer to NORSRAM Timing structure
* @param  Bank NORSRAM bank number
* @param  ExtendedMode FSMC Extended Mode
*          This parameter can be one of the following values:
*            @arg FSMC_EXTENDED_MODE_DISABLE
*            @arg FSMC_EXTENDED_MODE_ENABLE
* @retval HAL status
*/
HAL_StatusTypeDef FSMC_NORSRAM_Extended_Timing_Init(FSMC_NORSRAM_EXTENDED_TypeDef *Device,
                                                   FSMC_NORSRAM_TimingTypeDef *Timing, uint32_t Bank,
                                                   uint32_t ExtendedMode)
{
  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_EXTENDED_MODE(ExtendedMode));

  /* Set NORSRAM device timing register for write configuration, if extended mode is used */
  if (ExtendedMode == FSMC_EXTENDED_MODE_ENABLE)
  {
    /* Check the parameters */
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_EXTENDED_DEVICE(Device));
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_ADDRESS_SETUP_TIME(Timing->AddressSetupTime));
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_ADDRESS_HOLD_TIME(Timing->AddressHoldTime));
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_DATASETUP_TIME(Timing->DataSetupTime));
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_TURNAROUND_TIME(Timing->BusTurnAroundDuration));
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_ACCESS_MODE(Timing->AccessMode));
    assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK(Bank));

    /* [INIT REPLACEMENT] Skip hardware register configuration for FSMC timing */
    /* Original: MODIFY_REG(Device->BWTR[Bank], BWTR_CLEAR_MASK, ...) */
  }
  else
  {
    /* [INIT REPLACEMENT] Skip hardware register write */
    /* Original: Device->BWTR[Bank] = 0x0FFFFFFFU; */
  }

  return HAL_OK;
}
```

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_ll_fsmc.c

- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef  FSMC_NORSRAM_Init(FSMC_NORSRAM_TypeDef *Device,
                                    FSMC_NORSRAM_InitTypeDef *Init)
{
  uint32_t flashaccess;
  uint32_t btcr_reg;
  uint32_t mask;

  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_DEVICE(Device));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK(Init->NSBank));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_MUX(Init->DataAddressMux));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_MEMORY(Init->MemoryType));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_MEMORY_WIDTH(Init->MemoryDataWidth));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_BURSTMODE(Init->BurstAccessMode));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WAIT_POLARITY(Init->WaitSignalPolarity));
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD)
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WRAP_MODE(Init->WrapMode));
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD */
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WAIT_SIGNAL_ACTIVE(Init->WaitSignalActive));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WRITE_OPERATION(Init->WriteOperation));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WAITE_SIGNAL(Init->WaitSignal));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_EXTENDED_MODE(Init->ExtendedMode));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_ASYNWAIT(Init->AsynchronousWait));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WRITE_BURST(Init->WriteBurst));
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN)
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_CONTINOUS_CLOCK(Init->ContinuousClock));
#endif
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS)
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WRITE_FIFO(Init->WriteFifo));
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS */
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_PAGESIZE(Init->PageSize));

  /* Disable NORSRAM Device */
  __FSMC_NORSRAM_DISABLE(Device, Init->NSBank);

  /* Set NORSRAM device control parameters */
  if (Init->MemoryType == FSMC_MEMORY_TYPE_NOR)
  {
    flashaccess = FSMC_NORSRAM_FLASH_ACCESS_ENABLE;
  }
  else
  {
    flashaccess = FSMC_NORSRAM_FLASH_ACCESS_DISABLE;
  }

  btcr_reg = (flashaccess                   | \
              Init->DataAddressMux          | \
              Init->MemoryType              | \
              Init->MemoryDataWidth         | \
              Init->BurstAccessMode         | \
              Init->WaitSignalPolarity      | \
              Init->WaitSignalActive        | \
              Init->WriteOperation          | \
              Init->WaitSignal              | \
              Init->ExtendedMode            | \
              Init->AsynchronousWait        | \
              Init->WriteBurst);

#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD)
  btcr_reg |= Init->WrapMode;
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD */
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN)
  btcr_reg |= Init->ContinuousClock;
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN */
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS)
  btcr_reg |= Init->WriteFifo;
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS */
  btcr_reg |= Init->PageSize;

  mask = (FSMC_BCR1_MBKEN                |
          FSMC_BCR1_MUXEN                |
          FSMC_BCR1_MTYP                 |
          FSMC_BCR1_MWID                 |
          FSMC_BCR1_FACCEN               |
          FSMC_BCR1_BURSTEN              |
          FSMC_BCR1_WAITPOL              |
          FSMC_BCR1_WAITCFG              |
          FSMC_BCR1_WREN                 |
          FSMC_BCR1_WAITEN               |
          FSMC_BCR1_EXTMOD               |
          FSMC_BCR1_ASYNCWAIT            |
          FSMC_BCR1_CBURSTRW);

#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD)
  mask |= FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD;
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD */
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN)
  mask |= FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN;
#endif
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS)
  mask |= FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS;
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS */
  mask |= FSMC_BCR1_CPSIZE;

  MODIFY_REG(Device->BTCR[Init->NSBank], mask, btcr_reg);

#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN)
  /* Configure synchronous mode when Continuous clock is enabled for bank2..4 */
  if ((Init->ContinuousClock == FSMC_CONTINUOUS_CLOCK_SYNC_ASYNC) && (Init->NSBank != FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1))
  {
    MODIFY_REG(Device->BTCR[FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1], FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN, Init->ContinuousClock);
  }
#endif
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS)

  if (Init->NSBank != FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1)
  {
    /* Configure Write FIFO mode when Write Fifo is enabled for bank2..4 */
    SET_BIT(Device->BTCR[FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1], (uint32_t)(Init->WriteFifo));
  }
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS */

  return HAL_OK;
}

GetMMIOFunctionInfo indicates hardware register accesses. The function name 'Init' explicitly indicates initialization purpose. /**
* @brief  Initialize the FSMC_NORSRAM device according to the specified
*         control parameters in the FSMC_NORSRAM_InitTypeDef
* @param  Device Pointer to NORSRAM device instance
* @param  Init Pointer to NORSRAM Initialization structure
* @retval HAL status
*/
HAL_StatusTypeDef  FSMC_NORSRAM_Init(FSMC_NORSRAM_TypeDef *Device,
                                    FSMC_NORSRAM_InitTypeDef *Init)
{
  uint32_t flashaccess;
  uint32_t btcr_reg;
  uint32_t mask;

  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_DEVICE(Device));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK(Init->NSBank));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_MUX(Init->DataAddressMux));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_MEMORY(Init->MemoryType));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_MEMORY_WIDTH(Init->MemoryDataWidth));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_BURSTMODE(Init->BurstAccessMode));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WAIT_POLARITY(Init->WaitSignalPolarity));
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD)
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WRAP_MODE(Init->WrapMode));
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD */
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WAIT_SIGNAL_ACTIVE(Init->WaitSignalActive));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WRITE_OPERATION(Init->WriteOperation));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WAITE_SIGNAL(Init->WaitSignal));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_EXTENDED_MODE(Init->ExtendedMode));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_ASYNWAIT(Init->AsynchronousWait));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WRITE_BURST(Init->WriteBurst));
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN)
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_CONTINOUS_CLOCK(Init->ContinuousClock));
#endif
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS)
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_WRITE_FIFO(Init->WriteFifo));
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS */
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_PAGESIZE(Init->PageSize));

  /* Skip hardware disable operation */
  /* __FSMC_NORSRAM_DISABLE(Device, Init->NSBank); */

  /* Set NORSRAM device control parameters */
  if (Init->MemoryType == FSMC_MEMORY_TYPE_NOR)
  {
    flashaccess = FSMC_NORSRAM_FLASH_ACCESS_ENABLE;
  }
  else
  {
    flashaccess = FSMC_NORSRAM_FLASH_ACCESS_DISABLE;
  }

  btcr_reg = (flashaccess                   | \
              Init->DataAddressMux          | \
              Init->MemoryType              | \
              Init->MemoryDataWidth         | \
              Init->BurstAccessMode         | \
              Init->WaitSignalPolarity      | \
              Init->WaitSignalActive        | \
              Init->WriteOperation          | \
              Init->WaitSignal              | \
              Init->ExtendedMode            | \
              Init->AsynchronousWait        | \
              Init->WriteBurst);

#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD)
  btcr_reg |= Init->WrapMode;
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD */
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN)
  btcr_reg |= Init->ContinuousClock;
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN */
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS)
  btcr_reg |= Init->WriteFifo;
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS */
  btcr_reg |= Init->PageSize;

  mask = (FSMC_BCR1_MBKEN                |
          FSMC_BCR1_MUXEN                |
          FSMC_BCR1_MTYP                 |
          FSMC_BCR1_MWID                 |
          FSMC_BCR1_FACCEN               |
          FSMC_BCR1_BURSTEN              |
          FSMC_BCR1_WAITPOL              |
          FSMC_BCR1_WAITCFG              |
          FSMC_BCR1_WREN                 |
          FSMC_BCR1_WAITEN               |
          FSMC_BCR1_EXTMOD               |
          FSMC_BCR1_ASYNCWAIT            |
          FSMC_BCR1_CBURSTRW);

#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD)
  mask |= FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD;
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WRAPMOD */
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN)
  mask |= FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN;
#endif
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS)
  mask |= FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS;
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS */
  mask |= FSMC_BCR1_CPSIZE;

  /* Skip hardware register modification */
  /* MODIFY_REG(Device->BTCR[Init->NSBank], mask, btcr_reg); */

#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN)
  /* Skip synchronous mode configuration when Continuous clock is enabled for bank2..4 */
  /* if ((Init->ContinuousClock == FSMC_CONTINUOUS_CLOCK_SYNC_ASYNC) && (Init->NSBank != FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1))
  {
    MODIFY_REG(Device->BTCR[FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1], FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN, Init->ContinuousClock);
  } */
#endif
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS)

  /* Skip Write FIFO mode configuration when Write Fifo is enabled for bank2..4 */
  /* if (Init->NSBank != FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1)
  {
    SET_BIT(Device->BTCR[FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1], (uint32_t)(Init->WriteFifo));
  } */
#endif /* FSMC_BCR1_WFDIS */

  return HAL_OK;
}

### FSMC_NORSRAM_Timing_Init

```text
=== FSMC_NORSRAM_Timing_Init 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_ll_fsmc.c
- 行号：379
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef FSMC_NORSRAM_Timing_Init(FSMC_NORSRAM_TypeDef *Device,
                                          FSMC_NORSRAM_TimingTypeDef *Timing, uint32_t Bank)
{
#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN)
  uint32_t tmpr;
#endif

  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_DEVICE(Device));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_ADDRESS_SETUP_TIME(Timing->AddressSetupTime));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_ADDRESS_HOLD_TIME(Timing->AddressHoldTime));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_DATASETUP_TIME(Timing->DataSetupTime));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_TURNAROUND_TIME(Timing->BusTurnAroundDuration));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_CLK_DIV(Timing->CLKDivision));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_DATA_LATENCY(Timing->DataLatency));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_ACCESS_MODE(Timing->AccessMode));
  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK(Bank));

  /* Set FSMC_NORSRAM device timing parameters */
  MODIFY_REG(Device->BTCR[Bank + 1U], BTR_CLEAR_MASK, (Timing->AddressSetupTime                                  |
                                                       ((Timing->AddressHoldTime)        << FSMC_BTR1_ADDHLD_Pos)  |
                                                       ((Timing->DataSetupTime)          << FSMC_BTR1_DATAST_Pos)  |
                                                       ((Timing->BusTurnAroundDuration)  << FSMC_BTR1_BUSTURN_Pos) |
                                                       (((Timing->CLKDivision) - 1U)     << FSMC_BTR1_CLKDIV_Pos)  |
                                                       (((Timing->DataLatency) - 2U)     << FSMC_BTR1_DATLAT_Pos)  |
                                                       (Timing->AccessMode)));

#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN)
  /* Configure Clock division value (in NORSRAM bank 1) when continuous clock is enabled */
  if (HAL_IS_BIT_SET(Device->BTCR[FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1], FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN))
  {
    tmpr = (uint32_t)(Device->BTCR[FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1 + 1U] & ~((0x0FU) << FSMC_BTR1_CLKDIV_Pos));
    tmpr |= (uint32_t)(((Timing->CLKDivision) - 1U) << FSMC_BTR1_CLKDIV_Pos);
    MODIFY_REG(Device->BTCR[FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1 + 1U], FSMC_BTR1_CLKDIV, tmpr);
  }

#endif
  return HAL_OK;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Initializes timing parameters for FSMC NOR/SRAM memory controller by configuring hardware registers with timing values from the provided structure
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Function performs hardware initialization by writing timing configuration to FSMC NOR/SRAM registers using MODIFY_REG macro. It validates parameters and configures address setup time, data setup time, bus turnaround duration, clock division, data latency, and access mode. GetMMIOFunctionInfo shows register accesses through Device->BTCR array. The function is called from HAL_SRAM_Init as part of SRAM peripheral initialization, confirming its role as an initialization function. The replacement preserves parameter validation while removing hardware register writes, maintaining the expected return value of HAL_OK.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**\n* @brief  Initialize the FSMC_NORSRAM Timing according to the specified\n*         parameters in the FSMC_NORSRAM_TimingTypeDef\n* @param  Device Pointer to NORSRAM device instance\n* @param  Timing Pointer to NORSRAM Timing structure\n* @param  Bank NORSRAM bank number\n* @retval HAL status\n*/\nHAL_StatusTypeDef FSMC_NORSRAM_Timing_Init(FSMC_NORSRAM_TypeDef *Device,\n                                          FSMC_NORSRAM_TimingTypeDef *Timing, uint32_t Bank)\n{\n#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN)\n  uint32_t tmpr;\n#endif\n\n  /* Check the parameters */\n  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_DEVICE(Device));\n  assert_param(IS_FSMC_ADDRESS_SETUP_TIME(Timing->AddressSetupTime));\n  assert_param(IS_FSMC_ADDRESS_HOLD_TIME(Timing->AddressHoldTime));\n  assert_param(IS_FSMC_DATASETUP_TIME(Timing->DataSetupTime));\n  assert_param(IS_FSMC_TURNAROUND_TIME(Timing->BusTurnAroundDuration));\n  assert_param(IS_FSMC_CLK_DIV(Timing->CLKDivision));\n  assert_param(IS_FSMC_DATA_LATENCY(Timing->DataLatency));\n  assert_param(IS_FSMC_ACCESS_MODE(Timing->AccessMode));\n  assert_param(IS_FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK(Bank));\n\n  /* [INIT REPLACEMENT] Skip hardware register configuration for timing parameters */\n  /* Original code would write to Device->BTCR[Bank + 1U] using MODIFY_REG */\n\n#if defined(FSMC_BCR1_CCLKEN)\n  /* [INIT REPLACEMENT] Skip clock division configuration for continuous clock */\n  /* Original code would check Device->BTCR[FSMC_NORSRAM_BANK1] and modify registers */\n#endif\n\n  return HAL_OK;\n}

### HAL_DMAEx_MultiBufferStart

```text
=== HAL_DMAEx_MultiBufferStart 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_dma_ex.c
- 行号：100
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_DMAEx_MultiBufferStart(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma, uint32_t SrcAddress, uint32_t DstAddress, uint32_t SecondMemAddress, uint32_t DataLength)
{
  HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_OK;
  
  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_DMA_BUFFER_SIZE(DataLength));
  
  /* Memory-to-memory transfer not supported in double buffering mode */
  if (hdma->Init.Direction == DMA_MEMORY_TO_MEMORY)
  {
    hdma->ErrorCode = HAL_DMA_ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED;
    status = HAL_ERROR;
  }
  else
  {
    /* Process Locked */
    __HAL_LOCK(hdma);
    
    if(HAL_DMA_STATE_READY == hdma->State)
    {
      /* Change DMA peripheral state */
      hdma->State = HAL_DMA_STATE_BUSY; 
      
      /* Enable the double buffer mode */
      hdma->Instance->CR |= (uint32_t)DMA_SxCR_DBM;
      
      /* Configure DMA Stream destination address */
      hdma->Instance->M1AR = SecondMemAddress;
      
      /* Configure the source, destination address and the data length */
      DMA_MultiBufferSetConfig(hdma, SrcAddress, DstAddress, DataLength);
      
      /* Enable the peripheral */
      __HAL_DMA_ENABLE(hdma);
    }
    else
    {
      /* Return error status */
      status = HAL_BUSY;
    }
  }
  return status;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Starts a multi-buffer DMA transfer by enabling double buffer mode and configuring DMA registers
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function initializes DMA hardware for multi-buffer operation. GetFunctionInfo shows it performs hardware register accesses: enables double buffer mode (hdma->Instance->CR |= DMA_SxCR_DBM), sets second memory address (hdma->Instance->M1AR = SecondMemAddress), calls DMA_MultiBufferSetConfig for further configuration, and enables DMA peripheral. It changes DMA state from READY to BUSY and handles error conditions. These are typical initialization operations for DMA peripheral configuration, fitting the INIT classification. The function does not contain NVIC/OS operations (not CORE), data transfer (not RECV), interrupt handling (not IRQ), or polling loops (not LOOP).
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**\n* @brief  Starts the multi_buffer DMA Transfer.\n* @param  hdma       pointer to a DMA_HandleTypeDef structure that contains\n*                     the configuration information for the specified DMA Stream.\n* @param  SrcAddress The source memory Buffer address\n* @param  DstAddress The destination memory Buffer address\n* @param  SecondMemAddress The second memory Buffer address in case of multi buffer Transfer\n* @param  DataLength The length of data to be transferred from source to destination\n* @retval HAL status\n*/\nHAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_DMAEx_MultiBufferStart(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma, uint32_t SrcAddress, uint32_t DstAddress, uint32_t SecondMemAddress, uint32_t DataLength)\n{\n  HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_OK;\n  \n  /* Check the parameters */\n  assert_param(IS_DMA_BUFFER_SIZE(DataLength));\n  \n  /* Memory-to-memory transfer not supported in double buffering mode */\n  if (hdma->Init.Direction == DMA_MEMORY_TO_MEMORY)\n  {\n    hdma->ErrorCode = HAL_DMA_ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED;\n    status = HAL_ERROR;\n  }\n  else\n  {\n    /* Process Locked */\n    __HAL_LOCK(hdma);\n    \n    if(HAL_DMA_STATE_READY == hdma->State)\n    {\n      /* Change DMA peripheral state */\n      hdma->State = HAL_DMA_STATE_BUSY; \n      \n      /* Skip hardware-specific configuration for double buffer mode */\n      /* hdma->Instance->CR |= (uint32_t)DMA_SxCR_DBM; */\n      \n      /* Skip configuring DMA Stream destination address */\n      /* hdma->Instance->M1AR = SecondMemAddress; */\n      \n      /* Skip hardware-specific configuration */\n      /* DMA_MultiBufferSetConfig(hdma, SrcAddress, DstAddress, DataLength); */\n      \n      /* Skip enabling the peripheral */\n      /* __HAL_DMA_ENABLE(hdma); */\n    }\n    else\n    {\n      /* Return error status */\n      status = HAL_BUSY;\n    }\n  }\n  return status;\n}

### HAL_DMAEx_MultiBufferStart_IT

```text
=== HAL_DMAEx_MultiBufferStart_IT 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_dma_ex.c
- 行号：154
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_DMAEx_MultiBufferStart_IT(DMA_HandleTypeDef *hdma, uint32_t SrcAddress, uint32_t DstAddress, uint32_t SecondMemAddress, uint32_t DataLength)
{
  HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_OK;
  
  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_DMA_BUFFER_SIZE(DataLength));
  
  /* Memory-to-memory transfer not supported in double buffering mode */
  if (hdma->Init.Direction == DMA_MEMORY_TO_MEMORY)
  {
    hdma->ErrorCode = HAL_DMA_ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED;
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }
  
  /* Check callback functions */
  if ((NULL == hdma->XferCpltCallback) || (NULL == hdma->XferM1CpltCallback) || (NULL == hdma->XferErrorCallback))
  {
    hdma->ErrorCode = HAL_DMA_ERROR_PARAM;
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }
  
  /* Process locked */
  __HAL_LOCK(hdma);
  
  if(HAL_DMA_STATE_READY == hdma->State)
  {
    /* Change DMA peripheral state */
    hdma->State = HAL_DMA_STATE_BUSY;
    
    /* Initialize the error code */
    hdma->ErrorCode = HAL_DMA_ERROR_NONE;
    
    /* Enable the Double buffer mode */
    hdma->Instance->CR |= (uint32_t)DMA_SxCR_DBM;
    
    /* Configure DMA Stream destination address */
    hdma->Instance->M1AR = SecondMemAddress;
    
    /* Configure the source, destination address and the data length */
    DMA_MultiBufferSetConfig(hdma, SrcAddress, DstAddress, DataLength); 
    
    /* Clear all flags */
    __HAL_DMA_CLEAR_FLAG (hdma, __HAL_DMA_GET_TC_FLAG_INDEX(hdma));
    __HAL_DMA_CLEAR_FLAG (hdma, __HAL_DMA_GET_HT_FLAG_INDEX(hdma));
    __HAL_DMA_CLEAR_FLAG (hdma, __HAL_DMA_GET_TE_FLAG_INDEX(hdma));
    __HAL_DMA_CLEAR_FLAG (hdma, __HAL_DMA_GET_DME_FLAG_INDEX(hdma));
    __HAL_DMA_CLEAR_FLAG (hdma, __HAL_DMA_GET_FE_FLAG_INDEX(hdma));

    /* Enable Common interrupts*/
    hdma->Instance->CR  |= DMA_IT_TC | DMA_IT_TE | DMA_IT_DME;
    hdma->Instance->FCR |= DMA_IT_FE;
    
    if((hdma->XferHalfCpltCallback != NULL) || (hdma->XferM1HalfCpltCallback != NULL))
    {
      hdma->Instance->CR  |= DMA_IT_HT;
    }
    
    /* Enable the peripheral */
    __HAL_DMA_ENABLE(hdma); 
  }
  else
  {     
    /* Process unlocked */
    __HAL_UNLOCK(hdma);	  
    
    /* Return error status */
    status = HAL_BUSY;
  }  
  return status; 
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Starts multi-buffer DMA transfers with interrupt enabled, configuring double buffer mode and enabling DMA interrupts for data transfer operations.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function is classified as INIT because it performs hardware initialization and configuration of DMA peripheral for multi-buffer transfers with interrupts. Analysis of GetFunctionInfo shows it contains multiple hardware register accesses (hdma->Instance->CR, M1AR, FCR) to enable double buffer mode, set memory addresses, clear flags, and enable interrupts. GetMMIOFunctionInfo confirms hardware dependencies. The function preserves state management (hdma->State, hdma->ErrorCode), locking mechanisms (__HAL_LOCK/__HAL_UNLOCK), and parameter validation, but all hardware-specific register writes need to be removed in the replacement while maintaining the logical flow and error handling.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
