### HAL_ETH_ReleaseTxPacket

```text
=== HAL_ETH_ReleaseTxPacket 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：1443
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_ReleaseTxPacket(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  ETH_TxDescListTypeDef *dmatxdesclist = &heth->TxDescList;
  uint32_t numOfBuf =  dmatxdesclist->BuffersInUse;
  uint32_t idx =       dmatxdesclist->releaseIndex;
  uint8_t pktTxStatus = 1U;
  uint8_t pktInUse;
#ifdef HAL_ETH_USE_PTP
  ETH_TimeStampTypeDef *timestamp = &heth->TxTimestamp;
#endif /* HAL_ETH_USE_PTP */

  /* Loop through buffers in use.  */
  while ((numOfBuf != 0U) && (pktTxStatus != 0U))
  {
    pktInUse = 1U;
    numOfBuf--;
    /* If no packet, just examine the next packet.  */
    if (dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[idx] == NULL)
    {
      /* No packet in use, skip to next.  */
      idx = (idx + 1U) & (ETH_TX_DESC_CNT - 1U);
      pktInUse = 0U;
    }

    if (pktInUse != 0U)
    {
      /* Determine if the packet has been transmitted.  */
      if ((heth->Init.TxDesc[idx].DESC0 & ETH_DMATXDESC_OWN) == 0U)
      {
#ifdef HAL_ETH_USE_PTP
        /* Get timestamp low */
        timestamp->TimeStampLow = heth->Init.TxDesc[idx].DESC6;
        /* Get timestamp high */
        timestamp->TimeStampHigh = heth->Init.TxDesc[idx].DESC7;
#endif /* HAL_ETH_USE_PTP */

#if (USE_HAL_ETH_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
        /*Call registered callbacks*/
#ifdef HAL_ETH_USE_PTP
        /* Handle Ptp  */
        heth->txPtpCallback(dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[idx], timestamp);
#endif  /* HAL_ETH_USE_PTP */
        /* Release the packet.  */
        heth->txFreeCallback(dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[idx]);
#else
        /* Call callbacks */
#ifdef HAL_ETH_USE_PTP
        /* Handle Ptp  */
        HAL_ETH_TxPtpCallback(dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[idx], timestamp);
#endif  /* HAL_ETH_USE_PTP */
        /* Release the packet.  */
        HAL_ETH_TxFreeCallback(dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[idx]);
#endif  /* USE_HAL_ETH_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */

        /* Clear the entry in the in-use array.  */
        dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[idx] = NULL;

        /* Update the transmit relesae index and number of buffers in use.  */
        idx = (idx + 1U) & (ETH_TX_DESC_CNT - 1U);
        dmatxdesclist->BuffersInUse = numOfBuf;
        dmatxdesclist->releaseIndex = idx;
      }
      else
      {
        /* Get out of the loop!  */
        pktTxStatus = 0U;
      }
    }
  }
  return HAL_OK;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：LOOP
- 函数用途/功能描述：Releases transmitted Ethernet Tx packets by checking DMA descriptor ownership status and calling appropriate callbacks to free buffers.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Function contains a hardware-dependent while loop that checks the OWN bit in DMA descriptors to determine if packets have been transmitted. The loop condition depends on hardware register access (heth->Init.TxDesc[idx].DESC0 & ETH_DMATXDESC_OWN). This is classified as LOOP because the core logic involves polling hardware status. The replacement removes the hardware dependency while preserving callback execution and data structure updates.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**
* @brief  Release transmitted Tx packets.
* @param  heth: pointer to a ETH_HandleTypeDef structure that contains
*         the configuration information for ETHERNET module
* @retval HAL status
*/
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_ReleaseTxPacket(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  ETH_TxDescListTypeDef *dmatxdesclist = &heth->TxDescList;
  uint32_t numOfBuf =  dmatxdesclist->BuffersInUse;
  uint32_t idx =       dmatxdesclist->releaseIndex;
  uint8_t pktTxStatus = 1U;
  uint8_t pktInUse;
#ifdef HAL_ETH_USE_PTP
  ETH_TimeStampTypeDef *timestamp = &heth->TxTimestamp;
#endif /* HAL_ETH_USE_PTP */

  /* [LOOP REMOVED] Original loop checked hardware transmission status via OWN bit */
  /* Assume all packets have been transmitted and process them */
  while (numOfBuf != 0U)
  {
    pktInUse = 1U;
    numOfBuf--;
    /* If no packet, just examine the next packet.  */
    if (dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[idx] == NULL)
    {
      /* No packet in use, skip to next.  */
      idx = (idx + 1U) & (ETH_TX_DESC_CNT - 1U);
      pktInUse = 0U;
    }

    if (pktInUse != 0U)
    {
      /* [HARDWARE CHECK REMOVED] Assume packet has been transmitted (OWN bit is 0) */
#ifdef HAL_ETH_USE_PTP
        /* Get timestamp low */
        timestamp->TimeStampLow = heth->Init.TxDesc[idx].DESC6;
        /* Get timestamp high */
        timestamp->TimeStampHigh = heth->Init.TxDesc[idx].DESC7;
#endif /* HAL_ETH_USE_PTP */

#if (USE_HAL_ETH_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
        /*Call registered callbacks*/
#ifdef HAL_ETH_USE_PTP
        /* Handle Ptp  */
        heth->txPtpCallback(dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[idx], timestamp);
#endif  /* HAL_ETH_USE_PTP */
        /* Release the packet.  */
        heth->txFreeCallback(dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[idx]);
#else
        /* Call callbacks */
#ifdef HAL_ETH_USE_PTP
        /* Handle Ptp  */
        HAL_ETH_TxPtpCallback(dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[idx], timestamp);
#endif  /* HAL_ETH_USE_PTP */
        /* Release the packet.  */
        HAL_ETH_TxFreeCallback(dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[idx]);
#endif  /* USE_HAL_ETH_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */

        /* Clear the entry in the in-use array.  */
        dmatxdesclist->PacketAddress[idx] = NULL;

        /* Update the transmit relesae index and number of buffers in use.  */
        idx = (idx + 1U) & (ETH_TX_DESC_CNT - 1U);
        dmatxdesclist->BuffersInUse = numOfBuf;
        dmatxdesclist->releaseIndex = idx;
    }
  }
  return HAL_OK;
}

### HAL_ETH_SetMACFilterConfig

```text
=== HAL_ETH_SetMACFilterConfig 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：2372
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_SetMACFilterConfig(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth, const ETH_MACFilterConfigTypeDef *pFilterConfig)
{
  uint32_t filterconfig;
  uint32_t tmpreg1;

  if (pFilterConfig == NULL)
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }

  filterconfig = ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->PromiscuousMode |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->HashUnicast << 1) |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->HashMulticast << 2)  |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->DestAddrInverseFiltering << 3) |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->PassAllMulticast << 4) |
                  ((uint32_t)((pFilterConfig->BroadcastFilter == DISABLE) ? 1U : 0U) << 5) |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->SrcAddrInverseFiltering << 8) |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->SrcAddrFiltering << 9) |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->HachOrPerfectFilter << 10) |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->ReceiveAllMode << 31) |
                  pFilterConfig->ControlPacketsFilter);

  MODIFY_REG(heth->Instance->MACFFR, ETH_MACFFR_MASK, filterconfig);

  /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account :
  at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
  tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACFFR;
  HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
  (heth->Instance)->MACFFR = tmpreg1;

  return HAL_OK;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Configures Ethernet MAC (L2) filters by setting various filtering modes and options in the hardware register
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function is classified as INIT because it performs hardware initialization/configuration operations. Analysis shows: 1) It writes to peripheral hardware registers (MACFFR register via MODIFY_REG macro), 2) It contains hardware-specific delay operations (HAL_Delay for register write propagation), 3) It configures Ethernet MAC filter settings but doesn't perform data transmission/reception (not RECV), 4) It's not an interrupt handler (not IRQ), 5) It doesn't contain polling loops (not LOOP), 6) It doesn't involve NVIC/OS kernel/VTOR operations (not CORE). The function validates input parameters, combines filter configuration fields into a register value, and writes to hardware - all characteristics of an initialization/configuration function.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_SetMACFilterConfig(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth, const ETH_MACFilterConfigTypeDef *pFilterConfig)
{
  uint32_t filterconfig;
  uint32_t tmpreg1;

  if (pFilterConfig == NULL)
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }

  filterconfig = ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->PromiscuousMode |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->HashUnicast << 1) |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->HashMulticast << 2)  |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->DestAddrInverseFiltering << 3) |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->PassAllMulticast << 4) |
                  ((uint32_t)((pFilterConfig->BroadcastFilter == DISABLE) ? 1U : 0U) << 5) |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->SrcAddrInverseFiltering << 8) |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->SrcAddrFiltering << 9) |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->HachOrPerfectFilter << 10) |
                  ((uint32_t)pFilterConfig->ReceiveAllMode << 31) |
                  pFilterConfig->ControlPacketsFilter);

  /* [INIT REMOVED] Hardware register write: MODIFY_REG(heth->Instance->MACFFR, ETH_MACFFR_MASK, filterconfig); */

  /* [INIT REMOVED] Wait until the write operation will be taken into account :
  at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
  /* [INIT REMOVED] tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACFFR; */
  /* [INIT REMOVED] HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY); */
  /* [INIT REMOVED] (heth->Instance)->MACFFR = tmpreg1; */

  return HAL_OK;
}

### HAL_ETH_SetMDIOClockRange

```text
=== HAL_ETH_SetMDIOClockRange 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：2320
- 函数内容：void HAL_ETH_SetMDIOClockRange(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  uint32_t hclk;
  uint32_t tmpreg;

  /* Get the ETHERNET MACMIIAR value */
  tmpreg = (heth->Instance)->MACMIIAR;
  /* Clear CSR Clock Range CR[2:0] bits */
  tmpreg &= ETH_MACMIIAR_CR_MASK;

  /* Get hclk frequency value */
  hclk = HAL_RCC_GetHCLKFreq();

  /* Set CR bits depending on hclk value */
  if ((hclk >= 20000000U) && (hclk < 35000000U))
  {
    /* CSR Clock Range between 20-35 MHz */
    tmpreg |= (uint32_t)ETH_MACMIIAR_CR_Div16;
  }
  else if ((hclk >= 35000000U) && (hclk < 60000000U))
  {
    /* CSR Clock Range between 35-60 MHz */
    tmpreg |= (uint32_t)ETH_MACMIIAR_CR_Div26;
  }
  else if ((hclk >= 60000000U) && (hclk < 100000000U))
  {
    /* CSR Clock Range between 60-100 MHz */
    tmpreg |= (uint32_t)ETH_MACMIIAR_CR_Div42;
  }
  else if ((hclk >= 100000000U) && (hclk < 150000000U))
  {
    /* CSR Clock Range between 100-150 MHz */
    tmpreg |= (uint32_t)ETH_MACMIIAR_CR_Div62;
  }
  else /* ((hclk >= 150000000)&&(hclk <= 183000000))*/
  {
    /* CSR Clock Range between 150-183 MHz */
    tmpreg |= (uint32_t)ETH_MACMIIAR_CR_Div102;
  }

  /* Write to ETHERNET MAC MIIAR: Configure the ETHERNET CSR Clock Range */
  (heth->Instance)->MACMIIAR = (uint32_t)tmpreg;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Configures the clock range for ETH MDIO interface based on HCLK frequency
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Function performs hardware register configuration (reads/writes to MACMIIAR register) to set MDIO clock divider based on system clock frequency. This is a peripheral initialization/configuration function that fits the INIT category. GetMMIOFunctionInfo shows hardware register accesses, and GetFunctionInfo confirms it configures ETH MDIO interface clock range. The function doesn't perform data I/O (not RECV), isn't an interrupt handler (not IRQ), and doesn't contain polling loops (not LOOP).
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**\n* @brief  Configures the Clock range of ETH MDIO interface.\n* @param  heth: pointer to a ETH_HandleTypeDef structure that contains\n*         the configuration information for ETHERNET module\n* @retval None\n*/\nvoid HAL_ETH_SetMDIOClockRange(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)\n{\n  /* Skip hardware-specific configuration for MDIO clock range */\n  /* Original function would read HCLK frequency and configure MACMIIAR register */\n  /* Hardware register access removed for simulation */\n}
```

```

### HAL_ETH_SetWakeUpFilter

```text
=== HAL_ETH_SetWakeUpFilter 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：2605
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_SetWakeUpFilter(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth, uint32_t *pFilter, uint32_t Count)
{
  uint32_t regindex;

  if (pFilter == NULL)
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }

  /* Reset Filter Pointer */
  SET_BIT(heth->Instance->MACPMTCSR, ETH_MACPMTCSR_WFFRPR);

  /* Wake up packet filter config */
  for (regindex = 0; regindex < Count; regindex++)
  {
    /* Write filter regs */
    WRITE_REG(heth->Instance->MACRWUFFR, pFilter[regindex]);
  }

  return HAL_OK;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Configures the Ethernet wake-up filter by writing filter values to hardware registers to determine which packets should wake the system from low-power mode.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Based on analysis using GetFunctionInfo and GetMMIOFunctionInfo: 1) The function performs hardware register writes (SET_BIT to MACPMTCSR and WRITE_REG to MACRWUFFR) to configure wake-up filter settings. 2) It's a configuration/initialization function that sets up peripheral registers for wake-up functionality. 3) No data transmission/reception, interrupt handling, or OS operations are present. 4) According to classification priority (CORE > RECV > IRQ > INIT > LOOP > RETURNOK > SKIP > NEEDCHECK > NODRIVER), this fits INIT category as it initializes peripheral configuration. 5) Not CORE (no NVIC/OS/VTOR), not RECV (no data I/O), not IRQ (not interrupt-related), not LOOP (loop is for configuration writes, not polling).
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```

* @param  Count: number of filter registers, must be from 1 to 8.
* @retval None.
*/
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_SetWakeUpFilter(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth, uint32_t *pFilter, uint32_t Count)
{
  if (pFilter == NULL)
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }

  /* Skip hardware register writes for wake-up filter configuration */
  /* Original: SET_BIT(heth->Instance->MACPMTCSR, ETH_MACPMTCSR_WFFRPR); */
  /* Original: WRITE_REG(heth->Instance->MACRWUFFR, pFilter[regindex]); */

  return HAL_OK;
}

### HAL_ETH_Start

```text
=== HAL_ETH_Start 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：696
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_Start(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  uint32_t tmpreg1;

  if (heth->gState == HAL_ETH_STATE_READY)
  {
    heth->gState = HAL_ETH_STATE_BUSY;

    /* Set number of descriptors to build */
    heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescCnt = ETH_RX_DESC_CNT;

    /* Build all descriptors */
    ETH_UpdateDescriptor(heth);

    /* Enable the MAC transmission */
    SET_BIT(heth->Instance->MACCR, ETH_MACCR_TE);

    /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account :
    at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
    tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACCR;
    HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
    (heth->Instance)->MACCR = tmpreg1;

    /* Enable the MAC reception */
    SET_BIT(heth->Instance->MACCR, ETH_MACCR_RE);

    /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account :
    at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
    tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACCR;
    HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
    (heth->Instance)->MACCR = tmpreg1;

    /* Flush Transmit FIFO */
    ETH_FlushTransmitFIFO(heth);

    /* Enable the DMA transmission */
    SET_BIT(heth->Instance->DMAOMR, ETH_DMAOMR_ST);

    /* Enable the DMA reception */
    SET_BIT(heth->Instance->DMAOMR, ETH_DMAOMR_SR);

    heth->gState = HAL_ETH_STATE_STARTED;

    return HAL_OK;
  }
  else
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Enables Ethernet MAC and DMA reception and transmission by configuring hardware registers and updating driver state
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Function performs peripheral initialization/enablement operations: 1) Sets descriptor count, 2) Enables MAC transmission/reception via register writes, 3) Enables DMA transmission/reception, 4) Flushes transmit FIFO, 5) Updates driver state machine. Contains multiple hardware register accesses (MACCR, DMAOMR) and calls to hardware-dependent functions (ETH_UpdateDescriptor, ETH_FlushTransmitFIFO). Fits INIT classification as it initializes/enables peripheral functionality without performing data I/O (not RECV), interrupt handling (not IRQ), or polling loops (not LOOP). Not core OS/NVIC functionality (not CORE).
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：

### HAL_ETH_Start_IT

```text
=== HAL_ETH_Start_IT 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：753
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_Start_IT(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  uint32_t tmpreg1;

  if (heth->gState == HAL_ETH_STATE_READY)
  {
    heth->gState = HAL_ETH_STATE_BUSY;

    /* save IT mode to ETH Handle */
    heth->RxDescList.ItMode = 1U;
    /* Disable MMC Interrupts */
    SET_BIT(heth->Instance->MACIMR, ETH_MACIMR_TSTIM | ETH_MACIMR_PMTIM);

    /* Disable Rx MMC Interrupts */
    SET_BIT(heth->Instance->MMCRIMR, ETH_MMCRIMR_RGUFM | ETH_MMCRIMR_RFAEM | \
            ETH_MMCRIMR_RFCEM);

    /* Disable Tx MMC Interrupts */
    SET_BIT(heth->Instance->MMCTIMR, ETH_MMCTIMR_TGFM | ETH_MMCTIMR_TGFMSCM | \
            ETH_MMCTIMR_TGFSCM);

    /* Set number of descriptors to build */
    heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescCnt = ETH_RX_DESC_CNT;

    /* Build all descriptors */
    ETH_UpdateDescriptor(heth);

    /* Enable the MAC transmission */
    SET_BIT(heth->Instance->MACCR, ETH_MACCR_TE);

    /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account :
    at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
    tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACCR;
    HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
    (heth->Instance)->MACCR = tmpreg1;

    /* Enable the MAC reception */
    SET_BIT(heth->Instance->MACCR, ETH_MACCR_RE);

    /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account :
    at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
    tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACCR;
    HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
    (heth->Instance)->MACCR = tmpreg1;

    /* Flush Transmit FIFO */
    ETH_FlushTransmitFIFO(heth);

    /* Enable the DMA transmission */
    SET_BIT(heth->Instance->DMAOMR, ETH_DMAOMR_ST);

    /* Enable the DMA reception */
    SET_BIT(heth->Instance->DMAOMR, ETH_DMAOMR_SR);

    /* Enable ETH DMA interrupts:
    - Tx complete interrupt
    - Rx complete interrupt
    - Fatal bus interrupt
    */
    __HAL_ETH_DMA_ENABLE_IT(heth, (ETH_DMAIER_NISE | ETH_DMAIER_RIE | ETH_DMAIER_TIE  |
                                   ETH_DMAIER_FBEIE | ETH_DMAIER_AISE | ETH_DMAIER_RBUIE));

    heth->gState = HAL_ETH_STATE_STARTED;
    return HAL_OK;
  }
  else
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Enables Ethernet MAC and DMA reception/transmission in interrupt mode, configuring the peripheral for interrupt-driven operation.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Function is an initialization routine that starts Ethernet peripheral in interrupt mode. Analysis shows multiple hardware register accesses (MACIMR, MMCRIMR, MMCTIMR, MACCR, DMAOMR) and interrupt configuration that need to be removed. The function updates the driver's state machine (gState) and descriptor configuration, which must be preserved. It's called from initialization contexts (low_level_init and ethernet_link_thread). Classified as INIT because it initializes peripheral for operation, not as CORE (no NVIC/OS operations), RECV (no data transfer), or IRQ (not an interrupt handler).
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_Start_IT(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  if (heth->gState == HAL_ETH_STATE_READY)
  {
    heth->gState = HAL_ETH_STATE_BUSY;

    /* save IT mode to ETH Handle */
    heth->RxDescList.ItMode = 1U;

    /* Set number of descriptors to build */
    heth->RxDescList.RxBuildDescCnt = ETH_RX_DESC_CNT;

    /* Build all descriptors */
    ETH_UpdateDescriptor(heth);

    heth->gState = HAL_ETH_STATE_STARTED;
    return HAL_OK;
  }
  else
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }
}

{
  uint32_t tmpreg1;

  if (heth->gState == HAL_ETH_STATE_STARTED)
  {
    /* Set the ETH peripheral state to BUSY */
    heth->gState = HAL_ETH_STATE_BUSY;

    /* Disable the DMA transmission */
    CLEAR_BIT(heth->Instance->DMAOMR, ETH_DMAOMR_ST);

    /* Disable the DMA reception */
    CLEAR_BIT(heth->Instance->DMAOMR, ETH_DMAOMR_SR);

    /* Disable the MAC reception */
    CLEAR_BIT(heth->Instance->MACCR, ETH_MACCR_RE);

    /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account :
    at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
    tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACCR;
    HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
    (heth->Instance)->MACCR = tmpreg1;

    /* Flush Transmit FIFO */
    ETH_FlushTransmitFIFO(heth);

    /* Disable the MAC transmission */
    CLEAR_BIT(heth->Instance->MACCR, ETH_MACCR_TE);

    /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account :
    at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
    tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACCR;
    HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
    (heth->Instance)->MACCR = tmpreg1;

    heth->gState = HAL_ETH_STATE_READY;

    /* Return function status */
    return HAL_OK;
  }
  else
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }
}

This matches the INIT classification criteria as it configures peripheral hardware (albeit for stopping rather than starting). The replacement removes all MMIO operations while keeping the state management logic intact.

/**

*/
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_Stop(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  if (heth->gState == HAL_ETH_STATE_STARTED)
  {
    /* Set the ETH peripheral state to BUSY */
    heth->gState = HAL_ETH_STATE_BUSY;

    /* Skip transmit FIFO flush */

    /* Skip MAC transmission disable */
    /* [INIT REMOVED] CLEAR_BIT(heth->Instance->MACCR, ETH_MACCR_TE); */
    
    /* Skip second register write delay */
    /* [INIT REMOVED] HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY); */

    heth->gState = HAL_ETH_STATE_READY;

    /* Return function status */
    return HAL_OK;
  }
  else

}

### HAL_ETH_Stop_IT

```text
=== HAL_ETH_Stop_IT 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：883
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_Stop_IT(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth)
{
  ETH_DMADescTypeDef *dmarxdesc;
  uint32_t descindex;
  uint32_t tmpreg1;

  if (heth->gState == HAL_ETH_STATE_STARTED)
  {
    /* Set the ETH peripheral state to BUSY */
    heth->gState = HAL_ETH_STATE_BUSY;

    __HAL_ETH_DMA_DISABLE_IT(heth, (ETH_DMAIER_NISE | ETH_DMAIER_RIE | ETH_DMAIER_TIE  |
                                    ETH_DMAIER_FBEIE | ETH_DMAIER_AISE | ETH_DMAIER_RBUIE));

    /* Disable the DMA transmission */
    CLEAR_BIT(heth->Instance->DMAOMR, ETH_DMAOMR_ST);

    /* Disable the DMA reception */
    CLEAR_BIT(heth->Instance->DMAOMR, ETH_DMAOMR_SR);

    /* Disable the MAC reception */
    CLEAR_BIT(heth->Instance->MACCR, ETH_MACCR_RE);


    /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account :
    at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
    tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACCR;
    HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
    (heth->Instance)->MACCR = tmpreg1;

    /* Flush Transmit FIFO */
    ETH_FlushTransmitFIFO(heth);

    /* Disable the MAC transmission */
    CLEAR_BIT(heth->Instance->MACCR, ETH_MACCR_TE);

    /* Wait until the write operation will be taken into account :
    at least four TX_CLK/RX_CLK clock cycles */
    tmpreg1 = (heth->Instance)->MACCR;
    HAL_Delay(ETH_REG_WRITE_DELAY);
    (heth->Instance)->MACCR = tmpreg1;

    /* Clear IOC bit to all Rx descriptors */
    for (descindex = 0; descindex < (uint32_t)ETH_RX_DESC_CNT; descindex++)
    {
      dmarxdesc = (ETH_DMADescTypeDef *)heth->RxDescList.RxDesc[descindex];
      SET_BIT(dmarxdesc->DESC1, ETH_DMARXDESC_DIC);
    }

    heth->RxDescList.ItMode = 0U;

    heth->gState = HAL_ETH_STATE_READY;

    /* Return function status */
    return HAL_OK;
  }
  else
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }
}

Analysis shows: 1) It contains multiple hardware register accesses (DMAOMR, MACCR) for disabling DMA/MAC operations, 2) It calls hardware-dependent functions (ETH_FlushTransmitFIFO), 3) It performs hardware delay operations, 4) It updates peripheral state variables (gState, RxDescList.ItMode), 5) It's not a CORE function (no NVIC/OS/VTOR operations), not a RECV function (no data transfer), not an IRQ function (not an interrupt handler), and not a LOOP function (no peripheral-dependent polling loops). The function fits the INIT category as it's responsible for stopping/peripheral de-initialization operations.

### HAL_ETH_Transmit

```text
=== HAL_ETH_Transmit 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：953
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_Transmit(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth, ETH_TxPacketConfig *pTxConfig, uint32_t Timeout)
{
  uint32_t tickstart;
  ETH_DMADescTypeDef *dmatxdesc;

  if (pTxConfig == NULL)
  {
    heth->ErrorCode |= HAL_ETH_ERROR_PARAM;
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }

  if (heth->gState == HAL_ETH_STATE_STARTED)
  {
    /* Config DMA Tx descriptor by Tx Packet info */
    if (ETH_Prepare_Tx_Descriptors(heth, pTxConfig, 0) != HAL_ETH_ERROR_NONE)
    {
      /* Set the ETH error code */
      heth->ErrorCode |= HAL_ETH_ERROR_BUSY;
      return HAL_ERROR;
    }

    /* Ensure completion of descriptor preparation before transmission start */
    __DSB();

    dmatxdesc = (ETH_DMADescTypeDef *)(&heth->TxDescList)->TxDesc[heth->TxDescList.CurTxDesc];

    /* Incr current tx desc index */
    INCR_TX_DESC_INDEX(heth->TxDescList.CurTxDesc, 1U);

    /* Start transmission */
    /* issue a poll command to Tx DMA by writing address of next immediate free descriptor */
    WRITE_REG(heth->Instance->DMATPDR, (uint32_t)(heth->TxDescList.TxDesc[heth->TxDescList.CurTxDesc]));

    tickstart = HAL_GetTick();

    /* Wait for data to be transmitted or timeout occurred */
    while ((dmatxdesc->DESC0 & ETH_DMATXDESC_OWN) != (uint32_t)RESET)
    {
      if ((heth->Instance->DMASR & ETH_DMASR_FBES) != (uint32_t)RESET)
      {
        heth->ErrorCode |= HAL_ETH_ERROR_DMA;
        heth->DMAErrorCode = heth->Instance->DMASR;
        /* Return function status */
        return HAL_ERROR;
      }

      /* Check for the Timeout */
      if (Timeout != HAL_MAX_DELAY)
      {
        if (((HAL_GetTick() - tickstart) > Timeout) || (Timeout == 0U))
        {
          heth->ErrorCode |= HAL_ETH_ERROR_TIMEOUT;
          /* Clear TX descriptor so that we can proceed */
          dmatxdesc->DESC0 = (ETH_DMATXDESC_FS | ETH_DMATXDESC_LS);
          return HAL_ERROR;
        }
      }
    }

    /* Return function status */
    return HAL_OK;
  }
  else
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：RECV
- 函数用途/功能描述：Sends an Ethernet packet in polling mode by preparing DMA descriptors and initiating transmission
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function is a data transmission function that sends Ethernet packets. It contains hardware register writes (WRITE_REG to DMATPDR), polling loops waiting for hardware status (while loop checking DESC0 ownership), and hardware status reads (DMASR). According to the classification priority, RECV covers data transmission/reception functions. The replacement removes hardware operations while preserving error handling, state updates, and the call to ETH_Prepare_Tx_Descriptors which handles descriptor preparation.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**
* @brief  Sends an Ethernet Packet in polling mode.
* @param  heth: pointer to a ETH_HandleTypeDef structure that contains
*         the configuration information for ETHERNET module
* @param  pTxConfig: Hold the configuration of packet to be transmitted
* @param  Timeout: timeout value
* @retval HAL status
*/
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_Transmit(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth, ETH_TxPacketConfig *pTxConfig, uint32_t Timeout)
{
  if (pTxConfig == NULL)
  {
    heth->ErrorCode |= HAL_ETH_ERROR_PARAM;
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }

  if (heth->gState == HAL_ETH_STATE_STARTED)
  {
    /* Config DMA Tx descriptor by Tx Packet info */
    if (ETH_Prepare_Tx_Descriptors(heth, pTxConfig, 0) != HAL_ETH_ERROR_NONE)
    {
      /* Set the ETH error code */
      heth->ErrorCode |= HAL_ETH_ERROR_BUSY;
      return HAL_ERROR;
    }

    /* Simulate transmission - skip hardware operations */
    /* [RECV REPLACEMENT] Skip hardware register write and polling loop */
    
    /* Return function status */
    return HAL_OK;
  }
  else
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }
}

### HAL_ETH_Transmit_IT

```text
=== HAL_ETH_Transmit_IT 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：1028
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_Transmit_IT(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth, ETH_TxPacketConfig *pTxConfig)
{
  if (pTxConfig == NULL)
  {
    heth->ErrorCode |= HAL_ETH_ERROR_PARAM;
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }

  if (heth->gState == HAL_ETH_STATE_STARTED)
  {
    /* Save the packet pointer to release.  */
    heth->TxDescList.CurrentPacketAddress = (uint32_t *)pTxConfig->pData;

    /* Config DMA Tx descriptor by Tx Packet info */
    if (ETH_Prepare_Tx_Descriptors(heth, pTxConfig, 1) != HAL_ETH_ERROR_NONE)
    {
      heth->ErrorCode |= HAL_ETH_ERROR_BUSY;
      return HAL_ERROR;
    }

    /* Ensure completion of descriptor preparation before transmission start */
    __DSB();

    /* Incr current tx desc index */
    INCR_TX_DESC_INDEX(heth->TxDescList.CurTxDesc, 1U);

    /* Start transmission */
    /* issue a poll command to Tx DMA by writing address of next immediate free descriptor */
    if (((heth->Instance)->DMASR & ETH_DMASR_TBUS) != (uint32_t)RESET)
    {
      /* Clear TBUS ETHERNET DMA flag */
      (heth->Instance)->DMASR = ETH_DMASR_TBUS;
      /* Resume DMA transmission*/
      (heth->Instance)->DMATPDR = 0U;
    }

    return HAL_OK;

  }
  else
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：RECV
- 函数用途/功能描述：Sends an Ethernet packet in interrupt mode by configuring DMA descriptors and starting transmission
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function performs Ethernet packet transmission with hardware register accesses (DMASR read/write, DMATPDR write) and manages DMA descriptors. It's called from LwIP network stack for packet transmission. According to classification priority, this is a data transmission function (RECV type) that needs hardware operations replaced while preserving state management and error handling logic. The replacement removes hardware register writes, preserves descriptor preparation and state updates, and simulates transmission using HAL_BE_Out.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**
* @brief  Sends an Ethernet Packet in interrupt mode.
* @param  heth: pointer to a ETH_HandleTypeDef structure that contains
*         the configuration information for ETHERNET module
* @param  pTxConfig: Hold the configuration of packet to be transmitted
* @retval HAL status
*/
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_Transmit_IT(ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth, ETH_TxPacketConfig *pTxConfig)
{
  if (pTxConfig == NULL)
  {
    heth->ErrorCode |= HAL_ETH_ERROR_PARAM;
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }

  if (heth->gState == HAL_ETH_STATE_STARTED)
  {
    /* Save the packet pointer to release.  */
    heth->TxDescList.CurrentPacketAddress = (uint32_t *)pTxConfig->pData;

    /* Config DMA Tx descriptor by Tx Packet info */
    if (ETH_Prepare_Tx_Descriptors(heth, pTxConfig, 1) != HAL_ETH_ERROR_NONE)
    {
      heth->ErrorCode |= HAL_ETH_ERROR_BUSY;
      return HAL_ERROR;
    }

    /* Ensure completion of descriptor preparation before transmission start */
    __DSB();

    /* Incr current tx desc index */
    INCR_TX_DESC_INDEX(heth->TxDescList.CurTxDesc, 1U);

    /* Start transmission - simulate successful transmission */
    /* Simulate data transmission */
    HAL_BE_Out(0);

    return HAL_OK;

  }
  else
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }
}
```

### HAL_ETH_WritePHYRegister

```text
=== HAL_ETH_WritePHYRegister 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_eth.c
- 行号：2118
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_ETH_WritePHYRegister(const ETH_HandleTypeDef *heth, uint32_t PHYAddr, uint32_t PHYReg,
                                           uint32_t RegValue)
{
  uint32_t tmpreg1;
  uint32_t tickstart;

  /* Get the ETHERNET MACMIIAR value */
  tmpreg1 = heth->Instance->MACMIIAR;

  /* Keep only the CSR Clock Range CR[2:0] bits value */
  tmpreg1 &= ~ETH_MACMIIAR_CR_MASK;

  /* Prepare the MII register address value */
  tmpreg1 |= ((PHYAddr << 11U) & ETH_MACMIIAR_PA);                      /* Set the PHY device address */
  tmpreg1 |= (((uint32_t)PHYReg << 6U) & ETH_MACMIIAR_MR);              /* Set the PHY register address */
  tmpreg1 |= ETH_MACMIIAR_MW;                                           /* Set the write mode */
  tmpreg1 |= ETH_MACMIIAR_MB;                                           /* Set the MII Busy bit */

  /* Give the value to the MII data register */
  heth->Instance->MACMIIDR = (uint16_t)RegValue;

  /* Write the result value into the MII Address register */
  heth->Instance->MACMIIAR = tmpreg1;

  /* Get tick */
  tickstart = HAL_GetTick();

  /* Check for the Busy flag */
  while ((tmpreg1 & ETH_MACMIIAR_MB) == ETH_MACMIIAR_MB)
  {
    /* Check for the Timeout */
    if ((HAL_GetTick() - tickstart) > PHY_WRITE_TO)
    {
      return HAL_ERROR;
    }

    tmpreg1 = heth->Instance->MACMIIAR;
  }

  return HAL_OK;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Writes a value to a PHY (Physical Layer) register via the Ethernet MAC's MII management interface for PHY configuration
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：GetFunctionInfo revealed this function performs PHY register writes via MII interface with MMIO operations to MACMIIAR and MACMIIDR registers. GetMMIOFunctionInfo confirmed hardware register accesses. GetFunctionCallStack shows it's called by ETH_PHY_IO_WriteReg during Ethernet PHY initialization. This is classified as INIT because it configures PHY registers during Ethernet setup/initialization. The replacement removes hardware register writes while preserving the function signature and returning success.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```

### HAL_FLASHEx_Erase

```text
=== HAL_FLASHEx_Erase 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash_ex.c
- 行号：160
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_FLASHEx_Erase(FLASH_EraseInitTypeDef *pEraseInit, uint32_t *SectorError)
{
  HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_ERROR;
  uint32_t index = 0U;

  /* Process Locked */
  __HAL_LOCK(&pFlash);

  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_TYPEERASE(pEraseInit->TypeErase));

  /* Wait for last operation to be completed */
  status = FLASH_WaitForLastOperation((uint32_t)FLASH_TIMEOUT_VALUE);

  if (status == HAL_OK)
  {
    /*Initialization of SectorError variable*/
    *SectorError = 0xFFFFFFFFU;

    if (pEraseInit->TypeErase == FLASH_TYPEERASE_MASSERASE)
    {
      /*Mass erase to be done*/
      FLASH_MassErase((uint8_t) pEraseInit->VoltageRange, pEraseInit->Banks);

      /* Wait for last operation to be completed */
      status = FLASH_WaitForLastOperation((uint32_t)FLASH_TIMEOUT_VALUE);

      /* if the erase operation is completed, disable the MER Bit */
      FLASH->CR &= (~FLASH_MER_BIT);
    }
    else
    {
      /* Check the parameters */
      assert_param(IS_FLASH_NBSECTORS(pEraseInit->NbSectors + pEraseInit->Sector));

      /* Erase by sector by sector to be done*/
      for (index = pEraseInit->Sector; index < (pEraseInit->NbSectors + pEraseInit->Sector); index++)
      {
        FLASH_Erase_Sector(index, (uint8_t) pEraseInit->VoltageRange);

        /* Wait for last operation to be completed */
        status = FLASH_WaitForLastOperation((uint32_t)FLASH_TIMEOUT_VALUE);

        /* If the erase operation is completed, disable the SER and SNB Bits */
        CLEAR_BIT(FLASH->CR, (FLASH_CR_SER | FLASH_CR_SNB));

        if (status != HAL_OK)
        {
          /* In case of error, stop erase procedure and return the faulty sector*/
          *SectorError = index;
          break;
        }
      }
    }
    /* Flush the caches to be sure of the data consistency */
    FLASH_FlushCaches();
  }

  /* Process Unlocked */
  __HAL_UNLOCK(&pFlash);

  return status;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：LOOP
- 函数用途/功能描述：Performs mass erase or sector erase operations on FLASH memory based on configuration parameters
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Classified as LOOP because: 1) Contains hardware-dependent loops with sector iteration and polling via FLASH_WaitForLastOperation, 2) Has direct MMIO operations (FLASH->CR register writes), 3) Calls hardware-specific functions (FLASH_MassErase, FLASH_Erase_Sector, FLASH_FlushCaches), 4) Contains a for loop that depends on hardware status polling, 5) Performs actual erase operations rather than just initialization. The replacement removes all hardware-dependent operations while preserving parameter validation, process locking, and error reporting structure.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**
* @brief  Perform a mass erase or erase the specified FLASH memory sectors
* @param[in]  pEraseInit pointer to an FLASH_EraseInitTypeDef structure that
*         contains the configuration information for the erasing.
*
* @param[out]  SectorError pointer to variable  that
*         contains the configuration information on faulty sector in case of error
*         (0xFFFFFFFFU means that all the sectors have been correctly erased)
*
* @retval HAL Status
*/
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_FLASHEx_Erase(FLASH_EraseInitTypeDef *pEraseInit, uint32_t *SectorError)
{
  HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_ERROR;
  uint32_t index = 0U;

  /* Process Locked */
  __HAL_LOCK(&pFlash);

  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_TYPEERASE(pEraseInit->TypeErase));

  /* Skip waiting for last operation to be completed */
  status = HAL_OK;

  if (status == HAL_OK)
  {
    /*Initialization of SectorError variable*/
    *SectorError = 0xFFFFFFFFU;

    if (pEraseInit->TypeErase == FLASH_TYPEERASE_MASSERASE)
    {
      /* Skip mass erase hardware operation */
      /* [LOOP REMOVED] Skipped FLASH_MassErase hardware operation */

      /* Skip waiting for last operation to be completed */
      status = HAL_OK;

      /* Skip disabling MER Bit */
      /* [LOOP REMOVED] Skipped FLASH->CR &= (~FLASH_MER_BIT) */
    }
    else
    {
      /* Check the parameters */
      assert_param(IS_FLASH_NBSECTORS(pEraseInit->NbSectors + pEraseInit->Sector));

      /* Skip sector by sector erase loop */
      /* [LOOP REMOVED] Skipped for loop with FLASH_Erase_Sector and hardware polling */
      
      /* Simulate successful erase of all sectors */
      status = HAL_OK;
    }
    /* Skip flushing the caches */
    /* [LOOP REMOVED] Skipped FLASH_FlushCaches() */
  }

  /* Process Unlocked */
  __HAL_UNLOCK(&pFlash);

  return status;
}

### HAL_FLASHEx_Erase_IT

```text
=== HAL_FLASHEx_Erase_IT 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash_ex.c
- 行号：231
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_FLASHEx_Erase_IT(FLASH_EraseInitTypeDef *pEraseInit)
{
  HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_OK;

  /* Process Locked */
  __HAL_LOCK(&pFlash);

  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_TYPEERASE(pEraseInit->TypeErase));

  /* Enable End of FLASH Operation interrupt */
  __HAL_FLASH_ENABLE_IT(FLASH_IT_EOP);

  /* Enable Error source interrupt */
  __HAL_FLASH_ENABLE_IT(FLASH_IT_ERR);

  /* Clear pending flags (if any) */
  __HAL_FLASH_CLEAR_FLAG(FLASH_FLAG_EOP    | FLASH_FLAG_OPERR | FLASH_FLAG_WRPERR | \
                         FLASH_FLAG_PGAERR | FLASH_FLAG_PGPERR | FLASH_FLAG_PGSERR);

  if (pEraseInit->TypeErase == FLASH_TYPEERASE_MASSERASE)
  {
    /*Mass erase to be done*/
    pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing = FLASH_PROC_MASSERASE;
    pFlash.Bank = pEraseInit->Banks;
    FLASH_MassErase((uint8_t) pEraseInit->VoltageRange, pEraseInit->Banks);
  }
  else
  {
    /* Erase by sector to be done*/

    /* Check the parameters */
    assert_param(IS_FLASH_NBSECTORS(pEraseInit->NbSectors + pEraseInit->Sector));

    pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing = FLASH_PROC_SECTERASE;
    pFlash.NbSectorsToErase = pEraseInit->NbSectors;
    pFlash.Sector = pEraseInit->Sector;
    pFlash.VoltageForErase = (uint8_t)pEraseInit->VoltageRange;

    /*Erase 1st sector and wait for IT*/
    FLASH_Erase_Sector(pEraseInit->Sector, pEraseInit->VoltageRange);
  }

  return status;
}

Analysis shows: 1) It enables FLASH interrupts (EOP and ERR) using hardware-specific macros, 2) Clears pending FLASH flags, 3) Sets up procedure state in the pFlash structure, 4) Calls hardware-specific erase functions (FLASH_MassErase or FLASH_Erase_Sector), 5) Contains parameter validation and process locking. The function fits the INIT category as it performs peripheral initialization and configuration operations, setting up the hardware for subsequent interrupt-driven erase operations. It is not an interrupt handler (IRQ), data transfer function (RECV), or loop-dependent function (LOOP).

### HAL_FLASH_IRQHandler

```text
=== HAL_FLASH_IRQHandler 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash.c
- 行号：259
- 函数内容：void HAL_FLASH_IRQHandler(void)
{
  uint32_t addresstmp = 0U;
  
  /* Check FLASH operation error flags */
#if defined(FLASH_SR_RDERR) 
  if(__HAL_FLASH_GET_FLAG((FLASH_FLAG_OPERR | FLASH_FLAG_WRPERR | FLASH_FLAG_PGAERR | \
    FLASH_FLAG_PGPERR | FLASH_FLAG_PGSERR | FLASH_FLAG_RDERR)) != RESET)
#else
  if(__HAL_FLASH_GET_FLAG((FLASH_FLAG_OPERR | FLASH_FLAG_WRPERR | FLASH_FLAG_PGAERR | \
    FLASH_FLAG_PGPERR | FLASH_FLAG_PGSERR)) != RESET)
#endif /* FLASH_SR_RDERR */
  {
    if(pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing == FLASH_PROC_SECTERASE)
    {
      /*return the faulty sector*/
      addresstmp = pFlash.Sector;
      pFlash.Sector = 0xFFFFFFFFU;
    }
    else if(pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing == FLASH_PROC_MASSERASE)
    {
      /*return the faulty bank*/
      addresstmp = pFlash.Bank;
    }
    else
    {
      /*return the faulty address*/
      addresstmp = pFlash.Address;
    }
    
    /*Save the Error code*/
    FLASH_SetErrorCode();
    
    /* FLASH error interrupt user callback */
    HAL_FLASH_OperationErrorCallback(addresstmp);
    
    /*Stop the procedure ongoing*/
    pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing = FLASH_PROC_NONE;
  }
  
  /* Check FLASH End of Operation flag  */
  if(__HAL_FLASH_GET_FLAG(FLASH_FLAG_EOP) != RESET)
  {
    /* Clear FLASH End of Operation pending bit */
    __HAL_FLASH_CLEAR_FLAG(FLASH_FLAG_EOP);
    
    if(pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing == FLASH_PROC_SECTERASE)
    {
      /*Nb of sector to erased can be decreased*/
      pFlash.NbSectorsToErase--;
      
      /* Check if there are still sectors to erase*/
      if(pFlash.NbSectorsToErase != 0U)
      {
        addresstmp = pFlash.Sector;
        /*Indicate user which sector has been erased*/
        HAL_FLASH_EndOfOperationCallback(addresstmp);
        
        /*Increment sector number*/
        pFlash.Sector++;
        addresstmp = pFlash.Sector;
        FLASH_Erase_Sector(addresstmp, pFlash.VoltageForErase);
      }
      else
      {
        /*No more sectors to Erase, user callback can be called.*/
        /*Reset Sector and stop Erase sectors procedure*/
        pFlash.Sector = addresstmp = 0xFFFFFFFFU;
        pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing = FLASH_PROC_NONE;
        
        /* Flush the caches to be sure of the data consistency */
        FLASH_FlushCaches() ;
                
        /* FLASH EOP interrupt user callback */
        HAL_FLASH_EndOfOperationCallback(addresstmp);
      }
    }
    else 
    {
      if(pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing == FLASH_PROC_MASSERASE) 
      {
        /* MassErase ended. Return the selected bank */
        /* Flush the caches to be sure of the data consistency */
        FLASH_FlushCaches() ;

        /* FLASH EOP interrupt user callback */
        HAL_FLASH_EndOfOperationCallback(pFlash.Bank);
      }
      else
      {
        /*Program ended. Return the selected address*/
        /* FLASH EOP interrupt user callback */
        HAL_FLASH_EndOfOperationCallback(pFlash.Address);
      }
      pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing = FLASH_PROC_NONE;
    }
  }
  
  if(pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing == FLASH_PROC_NONE)
  {
    /* Operation is completed, disable the PG, SER, SNB and MER Bits */
    CLEAR_BIT(FLASH->CR, (FLASH_CR_PG | FLASH_CR_SER | FLASH_CR_SNB | FLASH_MER_BIT));

    /* Disable End of FLASH Operation interrupt */
    __HAL_FLASH_DISABLE_IT(FLASH_IT_EOP);
    
    /* Disable Error source interrupt */
    __HAL_FLASH_DISABLE_IT(FLASH_IT_ERR);
    
    /* Process Unlocked */
    __HAL_UNLOCK(&pFlash);
  }
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：IRQ
- 函数用途/功能描述：Handles FLASH peripheral interrupt requests, checking for operation completion and error flags, and managing FLASH erase/program operations.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Function is clearly an interrupt handler as indicated by the '_IRQHandler' suffix. It contains hardware-specific operations including reading/clearing FLASH status flags, writing to FLASH control register, disabling FLASH interrupts, and calling hardware operations like FLASH_Erase_Sector and FLASH_FlushCaches. According to classification priority order (CORE > RECV > IRQ > INIT > LOOP > RETURNOK > SKIP > NODRIVER), this function matches the IRQ category as it's a peripheral interrupt handler. It's not CORE because it doesn't configure NVIC/OS kernel/VTOR; it's a FLASH peripheral interrupt handler.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
void HAL_FLASH_IRQHandler(void)
{
  uint32_t addresstmp = 0U;
  
  /* Check FLASH operation error flags - simulate error flag check */
  /* Hardware flag check removed for simulation */
  /* Assume no error for simulation purposes */
  
  /* Check FLASH End of Operation flag - simulate EOP flag */
  /* Assume operation completed for simulation */
  
  if(pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing == FLASH_PROC_SECTERASE)
  {
    /*Nb of sector to erased can be decreased*/
    pFlash.NbSectorsToErase--;
    
    /* Check if there are still sectors to erase*/
    if(pFlash.NbSectorsToErase != 0U)
    {
      addresstmp = pFlash.Sector;
      /*Indicate user which sector has been erased*/
      HAL_FLASH_EndOfOperationCallback(addresstmp);
      
      /*Increment sector number*/
      pFlash.Sector++;
      addresstmp = pFlash.Sector;
      /* FLASH_Erase_Sector call removed for simulation */
    }
    else
    {
      /*No more sectors to Erase, user callback can be called.*/
      /*Reset Sector and stop Erase sectors procedure*/
      pFlash.Sector = addresstmp = 0xFFFFFFFFU;
      pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing = FLASH_PROC_NONE;
      
      /* FLASH EOP interrupt user callback */
      HAL_FLASH_EndOfOperationCallback(addresstmp);
    }
  }
  else 
  {
    if(pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing == FLASH_PROC_MASSERASE) 
    {
      /* MassErase ended. Return the selected bank */
      /* FLASH EOP interrupt user callback */
      HAL_FLASH_EndOfOperationCallback(pFlash.Bank);
    }
    else
    {
      /*Program ended. Return the selected address*/
      /* FLASH EOP interrupt user callback */
      HAL_FLASH_EndOfOperationCallback(pFlash.Address);
    }
    pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing = FLASH_PROC_NONE;
  }
  
  if(pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing == FLASH_PROC_NONE)
  {
    /* Process Unlocked */
    __HAL_UNLOCK(&pFlash);
  }
}

### HAL_FLASH_OB_Unlock

```text
=== HAL_FLASH_OB_Unlock 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash.c
- 行号：467
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_FLASH_OB_Unlock(void)
{
  if((FLASH->OPTCR & FLASH_OPTCR_OPTLOCK) != RESET)
  {
    /* Authorizes the Option Byte register programming */
    FLASH->OPTKEYR = FLASH_OPT_KEY1;
    FLASH->OPTKEYR = FLASH_OPT_KEY2;
  }
  else
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }  
  
  return HAL_OK;  
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】

- 函数用途/功能描述：Unlocks the FLASH Option Control Registers access by writing specific key values to enable option byte programming.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function performs hardware initialization by unlocking FLASH option control registers. It accesses FLASH peripheral registers (FLASH->OPTCR and FLASH->OPTKEYR) to check lock status and write unlock keys. As an initialization function with MMIO operations, it should be classified as INIT. The function contains no data transmission/reception, interrupt handling, OS operations, or polling loops. It simply enables access to option byte programming registers.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容

### HAL_FLASH_Program

```text
=== HAL_FLASH_Program 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash.c
- 行号：154
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_FLASH_Program(uint32_t TypeProgram, uint32_t Address, uint64_t Data)
{
  HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_ERROR;
  
  /* Process Locked */
  __HAL_LOCK(&pFlash);
  
  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_TYPEPROGRAM(TypeProgram));
  
  /* Wait for last operation to be completed */
  status = FLASH_WaitForLastOperation((uint32_t)FLASH_TIMEOUT_VALUE);
  
  if(status == HAL_OK)
  {
    if(TypeProgram == FLASH_TYPEPROGRAM_BYTE)
    {
      /*Program byte (8-bit) at a specified address.*/
      FLASH_Program_Byte(Address, (uint8_t) Data);
    }
    else if(TypeProgram == FLASH_TYPEPROGRAM_HALFWORD)
    {
      /*Program halfword (16-bit) at a specified address.*/
      FLASH_Program_HalfWord(Address, (uint16_t) Data);
    }
    else if(TypeProgram == FLASH_TYPEPROGRAM_WORD)
    {
      /*Program word (32-bit) at a specified address.*/
      FLASH_Program_Word(Address, (uint32_t) Data);
    }
    else
    {
      /*Program double word (64-bit) at a specified address.*/
      FLASH_Program_DoubleWord(Address, Data);
    }
    
    /* Wait for last operation to be completed */
    status = FLASH_WaitForLastOperation((uint32_t)FLASH_TIMEOUT_VALUE);
    
    /* If the program operation is completed, disable the PG Bit */
    FLASH->CR &= (~FLASH_CR_PG);  
  }
  
  /* Process Unlocked */
  __HAL_UNLOCK(&pFlash);
  
  return status;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Programs byte, halfword, word or double word data to flash memory at a specified address
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function performs flash memory programming operations with direct hardware register accesses (FLASH->CR) and memory-mapped I/O. Analysis of GetFunctionInfo shows it calls hardware-specific programming functions (FLASH_Program_Byte, etc.) that access FLASH registers. GetMMIOFunctionInfo indicates hardware operations, and examination of called functions confirms direct hardware register manipulation. The function fits INIT classification as it initializes and performs flash programming configuration operations, requiring removal of MMIO/register accesses while preserving process locking/unlocking and status management.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_FLASH_Program(uint32_t TypeProgram, uint32_t Address, uint64_t Data)
{
  HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_ERROR;
  
  /* Process Locked */
  __HAL_LOCK(&pFlash);
  
  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_TYPEPROGRAM(TypeProgram));
  
  /* Skip hardware wait operation */
  status = HAL_OK;
  
  if(status == HAL_OK)
  {
    /* Skip hardware programming operations based on TypeProgram */
    /* FLASH_Program_Byte, FLASH_Program_HalfWord, FLASH_Program_Word, FLASH_Program_DoubleWord calls removed */
    
    /* Skip hardware wait operation */
    status = HAL_OK;
    
    /* Skip hardware PG Bit disable operation */
    /* FLASH->CR &= (~FLASH_CR_PG); removed */
  }
  
  /* Process Unlocked */
  __HAL_UNLOCK(&pFlash);
  
  return status;
}

### HAL_FLASH_Program_IT

```text
=== HAL_FLASH_Program_IT 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash.c
- 行号：212
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_FLASH_Program_IT(uint32_t TypeProgram, uint32_t Address, uint64_t Data)
{
  HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_OK;
  
  /* Process Locked */
  __HAL_LOCK(&pFlash);

  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_TYPEPROGRAM(TypeProgram));

  /* Enable End of FLASH Operation interrupt */
  __HAL_FLASH_ENABLE_IT(FLASH_IT_EOP);
  
  /* Enable Error source interrupt */
  __HAL_FLASH_ENABLE_IT(FLASH_IT_ERR);

  pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing = FLASH_PROC_PROGRAM;
  pFlash.Address = Address;

  if(TypeProgram == FLASH_TYPEPROGRAM_BYTE)
  {
    /*Program byte (8-bit) at a specified address.*/
      FLASH_Program_Byte(Address, (uint8_t) Data);
  }
  else if(TypeProgram == FLASH_TYPEPROGRAM_HALFWORD)
  {
    /*Program halfword (16-bit) at a specified address.*/
    FLASH_Program_HalfWord(Address, (uint16_t) Data);
  }
  else if(TypeProgram == FLASH_TYPEPROGRAM_WORD)
  {
    /*Program word (32-bit) at a specified address.*/
    FLASH_Program_Word(Address, (uint32_t) Data);
  }
  else
  {
    /*Program double word (64-bit) at a specified address.*/
    FLASH_Program_DoubleWord(Address, Data);
  }

  return status;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Programs data to flash memory with interrupt support, enabling flash operation interrupts and calling appropriate programming functions based on data size.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function is classified as INIT because it initializes and configures the flash peripheral for programming operations with interrupt support. Key characteristics: 1) Enables flash interrupts (FLASH_IT_EOP and FLASH_IT_ERR), 2) Sets flash procedure state (pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing = FLASH_PROC_PROGRAM), 3) Calls hardware-specific flash programming functions (FLASH_Program_Byte, FLASH_Program_HalfWord, etc.), 4) Uses process locking mechanism. The function performs peripheral initialization and configuration operations, making it suitable for INIT classification. GetMMIOFunctionInfo showed no direct MMIO expressions but the function calls hardware programming functions that would perform MMIO operations. The replacement removes hardware-specific interrupt enable operations and programming function calls while preserving state updates and process locking.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_FLASH_Program_IT(uint32_t TypeProgram, uint32_t Address, uint64_t Data)
{

  /* Process Locked */
  __HAL_LOCK(&pFlash);

  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_FLASH_TYPEPROGRAM(TypeProgram));

  /* Skip hardware interrupt enable operations */
  /* __HAL_FLASH_ENABLE_IT(FLASH_IT_EOP); */
  /* __HAL_FLASH_ENABLE_IT(FLASH_IT_ERR); */

  pFlash.ProcedureOnGoing = FLASH_PROC_PROGRAM;
  pFlash.Address = Address;

  /* Skip hardware-specific flash programming operations */

### HAL_FLASH_Unlock

```text
=== HAL_FLASH_Unlock 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_flash.c
- 行号：431
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_FLASH_Unlock(void)
{
  HAL_StatusTypeDef status = HAL_OK;

  if(READ_BIT(FLASH->CR, FLASH_CR_LOCK) != RESET)
  {
    /* Authorize the FLASH Registers access */
    WRITE_REG(FLASH->KEYR, FLASH_KEY1);
    WRITE_REG(FLASH->KEYR, FLASH_KEY2);

    /* Verify Flash is unlocked */
    if(READ_BIT(FLASH->CR, FLASH_CR_LOCK) != RESET)
    {
      status = HAL_ERROR;
    }
  }

  return status;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Unlocks access to FLASH control registers for programming/erasure operations
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function performs hardware initialization/configuration operations on the FLASH peripheral. It reads and writes to FLASH control registers (FLASH->CR and FLASH->KEYR) to unlock flash memory access. The function contains MMIO operations that need to be removed in the replacement. It fits the INIT category as it configures peripheral access permissions and returns status. Not CORE (no NVIC/OS operations), not RECV (no data I/O), not IRQ (not interrupt handler), not LOOP (no peripheral-dependent loops).
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**
* @brief  Unlock the FLASH control register access
* @retval HAL Status
*/
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_FLASH_Unlock(void)
{
  /* Simulate successful flash unlock */
  return HAL_OK;
}

### HAL_GPIO_EXTI_IRQHandler

```text
=== HAL_GPIO_EXTI_IRQHandler 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_gpio.c
- 行号：492
- 函数内容：void HAL_GPIO_EXTI_IRQHandler(uint16_t GPIO_Pin)
{
  /* EXTI line interrupt detected */
  if(__HAL_GPIO_EXTI_GET_IT(GPIO_Pin) != RESET)
  {
    __HAL_GPIO_EXTI_CLEAR_IT(GPIO_Pin);
    HAL_GPIO_EXTI_Callback(GPIO_Pin);
  }
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：IRQ
- 函数用途/功能描述：Handles EXTI (External Interrupt) interrupt requests for GPIO pins, checks interrupt flags, clears them, and calls the application callback function.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function is an interrupt handler (IRQHandler) that handles GPIO EXTI interrupts. It checks interrupt flags using __HAL_GPIO_EXTI_GET_IT, clears them with __HAL_GPIO_EXTI_CLEAR_IT, and calls HAL_GPIO_EXTI_Callback. According to the classification priority, interrupt handlers should be classified as IRQ. The function does not contain NVIC configuration (not CORE), data transmission/reception (not RECV), initialization (not INIT), or polling loops (not LOOP). The replacement strategy for IRQ functions is to remove hardware operations while preserving interrupt flag checks and callback calls. The replacement code simulates the interrupt by always calling the callback function and removes the hardware-specific flag checking and clearing operations.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
/**\n* @brief  This function handles EXTI interrupt request.\n* @param  GPIO_Pin Specifies the pins connected EXTI line\n* @retval None\n*/\nvoid HAL_GPIO_EXTI_IRQHandler(uint16_t GPIO_Pin)\n{\n  /* EXTI line interrupt detected */\n  /* Simulate interrupt flag being set - always execute callback */\n  HAL_GPIO_EXTI_Callback(GPIO_Pin);\n  /* No need to clear hardware interrupt flags in simulation */\n}
```

### HAL_GPIO_Init

```text
=== HAL_GPIO_Init 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_gpio.c
- 行号：164
- 函数内容：void HAL_GPIO_Init(GPIO_TypeDef  *GPIOx, GPIO_InitTypeDef *GPIO_Init)
{
  uint32_t position;
  uint32_t ioposition = 0x00U;
  uint32_t iocurrent = 0x00U;
  uint32_t temp = 0x00U;

  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_GPIO_ALL_INSTANCE(GPIOx));
  assert_param(IS_GPIO_PIN(GPIO_Init->Pin));
  assert_param(IS_GPIO_MODE(GPIO_Init->Mode));

  /* Configure the port pins */
  for(position = 0U; position < GPIO_NUMBER; position++)
  {
    /* Get the IO position */
    ioposition = 0x01U << position;
    /* Get the current IO position */
    iocurrent = (uint32_t)(GPIO_Init->Pin) & ioposition;

    if(iocurrent == ioposition)
    {
      /*--------------------- GPIO Mode Configuration ------------------------*/
      /* In case of Output or Alternate function mode selection */
      if(((GPIO_Init->Mode & GPIO_MODE) == MODE_OUTPUT) || \
          (GPIO_Init->Mode & GPIO_MODE) == MODE_AF)
      {
        /* Check the Speed parameter */
        assert_param(IS_GPIO_SPEED(GPIO_Init->Speed));
        /* Configure the IO Speed */
        temp = GPIOx->OSPEEDR; 
        temp &= ~(GPIO_OSPEEDER_OSPEEDR0 << (position * 2U));
        temp |= (GPIO_Init->Speed << (position * 2U));
        GPIOx->OSPEEDR = temp;

        /* Configure the IO Output Type */
        temp = GPIOx->OTYPER;
        temp &= ~(GPIO_OTYPER_OT_0 << position) ;
        temp |= (((GPIO_Init->Mode & OUTPUT_TYPE) >> OUTPUT_TYPE_Pos) << position);
        GPIOx->OTYPER = temp;
       }

      if((GPIO_Init->Mode & GPIO_MODE) != MODE_ANALOG)
      {
        /* Check the parameters */
        assert_param(IS_GPIO_PULL(GPIO_Init->Pull));
        
        /* Activate the Pull-up or Pull down resistor for the current IO */
        temp = GPIOx->PUPDR;
        temp &= ~(GPIO_PUPDR_PUPDR0 << (position * 2U));
        temp |= ((GPIO_Init->Pull) << (position * 2U));
        GPIOx->PUPDR = temp;
      }

      /* In case of Alternate function mode selection */
      if((GPIO_Init->Mode & GPIO_MODE) == MODE_AF)
      {
        /* Check the Alternate function parameter */
        assert_param(IS_GPIO_AF(GPIO_Init->Alternate));
        /* Configure Alternate function mapped with the current IO */
        temp = GPIOx->AFR[position >> 3U];
        temp &= ~(0xFU << ((uint32_t)(position & 0x07U) * 4U)) ;
        temp |= ((uint32_t)(GPIO_Init->Alternate) << (((uint32_t)position & 0x07U) * 4U));
        GPIOx->AFR[position >> 3U] = temp;
      }

      /* Configure IO Direction mode (Input, Output, Alternate or Analog) */
      temp = GPIOx->MODER;
      temp &= ~(GPIO_MODER_MODER0 << (position * 2U));
      temp |= ((GPIO_Init->Mode & GPIO_MODE) << (position * 2U));
      GPIOx->MODER = temp;

      /*--------------------- EXTI Mode Configuration ------------------------*/
      /* Configure the External Interrupt or event for the current IO */
      if((GPIO_Init->Mode & EXTI_MODE) != 0x00U)
      {
        /* Enable SYSCFG Clock */
        __HAL_RCC_SYSCFG_CLK_ENABLE();

        temp = SYSCFG->EXTICR[position >> 2U];
        temp &= ~(0x0FU << (4U * (position & 0x03U)));
        temp |= ((uint32_t)(GPIO_GET_INDEX(GPIOx)) << (4U * (position & 0x03U)));
        SYSCFG->EXTICR[position >> 2U] = temp;

        /* Clear Rising Falling edge configuration */
        temp = EXTI->RTSR;
        temp &= ~((uint32_t)iocurrent);
        if((GPIO_Init->Mode & TRIGGER_RISING) != 0x00U)
        {
          temp |= iocurrent;
        }
        EXTI->RTSR = temp;

        temp = EXTI->FTSR;
        temp &= ~((uint32_t)iocurrent);
        if((GPIO_Init->Mode & TRIGGER_FALLING) != 0x00U)
        {
          temp |= iocurrent;
        }
        EXTI->FTSR = temp;

        temp = EXTI->EMR;
        temp &= ~((uint32_t)iocurrent);
        if((GPIO_Init->Mode & EXTI_EVT) != 0x00U)
        {
          temp |= iocurrent;
        }
        EXTI->EMR = temp;

        /* Clear EXTI line configuration */
        temp = EXTI->IMR;
        temp &= ~((uint32_t)iocurrent);
        if((GPIO_Init->Mode & EXTI_IT) != 0x00U)
        {
          temp |= iocurrent;
        }
        EXTI->IMR = temp;
      }
    }
  }
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Initializes GPIO pins according to specified configuration parameters including mode, speed, pull-up/down, alternate function, and interrupt settings
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：HAL_GPIO_Init is classified as INIT because: 1) It's a peripheral initialization function that configures GPIO hardware registers (OSPEEDR, OTYPER, PUPDR, AFR, MODER) and EXTI interrupt registers when needed. 2) GetMMIOFunctionInfo revealed extensive register access operations including writes to GPIO and EXTI control registers. 3) The function performs parameter validation and iterates through GPIO pins to apply configuration. 4) It doesn't fit higher priority categories: not CORE (no NVIC/OS/VTOR configuration), not RECV (no data transmission/reception), not IRQ (not an interrupt handler). 5) As an initialization function, it needs replacement to remove hardware dependencies while preserving the logical structure and parameter validation.

### HAL_I2C_DeInit

```text
=== HAL_I2C_DeInit 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_i2c.c
- 行号：560
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_I2C_DeInit(I2C_HandleTypeDef *hi2c)
{
  /* Check the I2C handle allocation */
  if (hi2c == NULL)
  {
    return HAL_ERROR;
  }

  /* Check the parameters */
  assert_param(IS_I2C_ALL_INSTANCE(hi2c->Instance));

  hi2c->State = HAL_I2C_STATE_BUSY;

  /* Disable the I2C Peripheral Clock */
  __HAL_I2C_DISABLE(hi2c);

#if (USE_HAL_I2C_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)
  if (hi2c->MspDeInitCallback == NULL)
  {
    hi2c->MspDeInitCallback = HAL_I2C_MspDeInit; /* Legacy weak MspDeInit  */
  }

  /* DeInit the low level hardware: GPIO, CLOCK, NVIC */
  hi2c->MspDeInitCallback(hi2c);
#else
  /* DeInit the low level hardware: GPIO, CLOCK, NVIC */
  HAL_I2C_MspDeInit(hi2c);
#endif /* USE_HAL_I2C_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */

  hi2c->ErrorCode     = HAL_I2C_ERROR_NONE;
  hi2c->State         = HAL_I2C_STATE_RESET;
  hi2c->PreviousState = I2C_STATE_NONE;
  hi2c->Mode          = HAL_I2C_MODE_NONE;

  /* Release Lock */
  __HAL_UNLOCK(hi2c);

  return HAL_OK;
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：De-initializes the I2C peripheral by disabling its clock, calling low-level hardware de-initialization, and resetting the I2C handle state.
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function performs peripheral de-initialization operations including disabling the I2C peripheral clock via __HAL_I2C_DISABLE and calling MSP de-initialization callbacks (HAL_I2C_MspDeInit) that handle hardware-specific cleanup. While GetMMIOFunctionInfo returned no explicit MMIO expressions, the function contains hardware-dependent operations that need to be removed. The function preserves important state updates (ErrorCode, State, PreviousState, Mode) and lock management that must be maintained. It's called from error handling paths (I2Cx_Error) and follows the pattern of initialization/de-initialization functions. The replacement code removes hardware-specific operations (clock disable and MSP callbacks) while preserving all state management and parameter validation.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：

/**\n* @brief  DeInitialize the I2C peripheral.\n* @param  hi2c Pointer to a I2C_HandleTypeDef structure that contains\n*         the configuration information for the specified I2C.\n* @retval HAL status\n*/\nHAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_I2C_DeInit(I2C_HandleTypeDef *hi2c)\n{\n  /* Check the I2C handle allocation */\n  if (hi2c == NULL)\n  {\n    return HAL_ERROR;\n  }\n\n  /* Check the parameters */\n  assert_param(IS_I2C_ALL_INSTANCE(hi2c->Instance));\n\n  hi2c->State = HAL_I2C_STATE_BUSY;\n\n  /* Skip hardware-specific I2C peripheral clock disable */\n  /* __HAL_I2C_DISABLE(hi2c); */\n\n#if (USE_HAL_I2C_REGISTER_CALLBACKS == 1)\n  if (hi2c->MspDeInitCallback == NULL)\n  {\n    hi2c->MspDeInitCallback = HAL_I2C_MspDeInit; /* Legacy weak MspDeInit  */\n  }\n\n  /* Skip low level hardware de-initialization: GPIO, CLOCK, NVIC */\n  /* hi2c->MspDeInitCallback(hi2c); */\n#else\n  /* Skip low level hardware de-initialization: GPIO, CLOCK, NVIC */\n  /* HAL_I2C_MspDeInit(hi2c); */\n#endif /* USE_HAL_I2C_REGISTER_CALLBACKS */\n\n  hi2c->ErrorCode     = HAL_I2C_ERROR_NONE;\n  hi2c->State         = HAL_I2C_STATE_RESET;\n  hi2c->PreviousState = I2C_STATE_NONE;\n  hi2c->Mode          = HAL_I2C_MODE_NONE;\n\n  /* Release Lock */\n  __HAL_UNLOCK(hi2c);\n\n  return HAL_OK;\n}

### HAL_I2C_DisableListen_IT

```text
=== HAL_I2C_DisableListen_IT 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_i2c.c
- 行号：4688
- 函数内容：HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_I2C_DisableListen_IT(I2C_HandleTypeDef *hi2c)
{
  /* Declaration of tmp to prevent undefined behavior of volatile usage */
  uint32_t tmp;

  /* Disable Address listen mode only if a transfer is not ongoing */
  if (hi2c->State == HAL_I2C_STATE_LISTEN)
  {
    tmp = (uint32_t)(hi2c->State) & I2C_STATE_MSK;
    hi2c->PreviousState = tmp | (uint32_t)(hi2c->Mode);
    hi2c->State = HAL_I2C_STATE_READY;
    hi2c->Mode = HAL_I2C_MODE_NONE;

    /* Disable Address Acknowledge */
    CLEAR_BIT(hi2c->Instance->CR1, I2C_CR1_ACK);

    /* Disable EVT and ERR interrupt */
    __HAL_I2C_DISABLE_IT(hi2c, I2C_IT_EVT | I2C_IT_ERR);

    return HAL_OK;
  }
  else
  {
    return HAL_BUSY;
  }
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：INIT
- 函数用途/功能描述：Disables I2C address listen mode with interrupt capability by clearing hardware configuration bits and disabling interrupts
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：This function is classified as INIT because it performs hardware configuration operations to disable I2C address listen mode. Key characteristics: 1) Contains hardware register access via CLEAR_BIT(hi2c->Instance->CR1, I2C_CR1_ACK) to disable address acknowledge, 2) Calls __HAL_I2C_DISABLE_IT to disable I2C event and error interrupts, 3) Manages I2C state variables (State, Mode, PreviousState) which must be preserved, 4) No data transmission/reception (not RECV), not an interrupt handler (not IRQ), no polling loops (not LOOP), and not CORE (doesn't configure NVIC directly). The replacement removes hardware-specific operations while preserving state management logic.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
HAL_StatusTypeDef HAL_I2C_DisableListen_IT(I2C_HandleTypeDef *hi2c)
{
  /* Declaration of tmp to prevent undefined behavior of volatile usage */
  uint32_t tmp;

  /* Disable Address listen mode only if a transfer is not ongoing */
  if (hi2c->State == HAL_I2C_STATE_LISTEN)
  {
    tmp = (uint32_t)(hi2c->State) & I2C_STATE_MSK;
    hi2c->PreviousState = tmp | (uint32_t)(hi2c->Mode);
    hi2c->State = HAL_I2C_STATE_READY;
    hi2c->Mode = HAL_I2C_MODE_NONE;

    /* Disable Address Acknowledge - hardware operation removed for simulation */

    return HAL_OK;
  }
  else
  {

  }
}

### HAL_I2C_ER_IRQHandler

```text
=== HAL_I2C_ER_IRQHandler 函数分析与替换信息 ===

【函数基本信息】
- 文件路径：/home/haojie/posixGen_Demos/LwIP_HTTP_Server_Socket_RTOS/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_hal_i2c.c
- 行号：4952
- 函数内容：void HAL_I2C_ER_IRQHandler(I2C_HandleTypeDef *hi2c)
{
  HAL_I2C_ModeTypeDef tmp1;
  uint32_t tmp2;
  HAL_I2C_StateTypeDef tmp3;
  uint32_t tmp4;
  uint32_t sr1itflags = READ_REG(hi2c->Instance->SR1);
  uint32_t itsources  = READ_REG(hi2c->Instance->CR2);
  uint32_t error      = HAL_I2C_ERROR_NONE;
  HAL_I2C_ModeTypeDef CurrentMode   = hi2c->Mode;

  /* I2C Bus error interrupt occurred ----------------------------------------*/
  if ((I2C_CHECK_FLAG(sr1itflags, I2C_FLAG_BERR) != RESET) && (I2C_CHECK_IT_SOURCE(itsources, I2C_IT_ERR) != RESET))
  {
    error |= HAL_I2C_ERROR_BERR;

    /* Clear BERR flag */
    __HAL_I2C_CLEAR_FLAG(hi2c, I2C_FLAG_BERR);
  }

  /* I2C Arbitration Lost error interrupt occurred ---------------------------*/
  if ((I2C_CHECK_FLAG(sr1itflags, I2C_FLAG_ARLO) != RESET) && (I2C_CHECK_IT_SOURCE(itsources, I2C_IT_ERR) != RESET))
  {
    error |= HAL_I2C_ERROR_ARLO;

    /* Clear ARLO flag */
    __HAL_I2C_CLEAR_FLAG(hi2c, I2C_FLAG_ARLO);
  }

  /* I2C Acknowledge failure error interrupt occurred ------------------------*/
  if ((I2C_CHECK_FLAG(sr1itflags, I2C_FLAG_AF) != RESET) && (I2C_CHECK_IT_SOURCE(itsources, I2C_IT_ERR) != RESET))
  {
    tmp1 = CurrentMode;
    tmp2 = hi2c->XferCount;
    tmp3 = hi2c->State;
    tmp4 = hi2c->PreviousState;
    if ((tmp1 == HAL_I2C_MODE_SLAVE) && (tmp2 == 0U) && \
        ((tmp3 == HAL_I2C_STATE_BUSY_TX) || (tmp3 == HAL_I2C_STATE_BUSY_TX_LISTEN) || \
         ((tmp3 == HAL_I2C_STATE_LISTEN) && (tmp4 == I2C_STATE_SLAVE_BUSY_TX))))
    {
      I2C_Slave_AF(hi2c);
    }
    else
    {
      /* Clear AF flag */
      __HAL_I2C_CLEAR_FLAG(hi2c, I2C_FLAG_AF);

      error |= HAL_I2C_ERROR_AF;

      /* Do not generate a STOP in case of Slave receive non acknowledge during transfer (mean not at the end of transfer) */
      if ((CurrentMode == HAL_I2C_MODE_MASTER) || (CurrentMode == HAL_I2C_MODE_MEM))
      {
        /* Generate Stop */
        SET_BIT(hi2c->Instance->CR1, I2C_CR1_STOP);
      }
    }
  }

  /* I2C Over-Run/Under-Run interrupt occurred -------------------------------*/
  if ((I2C_CHECK_FLAG(sr1itflags, I2C_FLAG_OVR) != RESET) && (I2C_CHECK_IT_SOURCE(itsources, I2C_IT_ERR) != RESET))
  {
    error |= HAL_I2C_ERROR_OVR;
    /* Clear OVR flag */
    __HAL_I2C_CLEAR_FLAG(hi2c, I2C_FLAG_OVR);
  }

  /* Call the Error Callback in case of Error detected -----------------------*/
  if (error != HAL_I2C_ERROR_NONE)
  {
    hi2c->ErrorCode |= error;
    I2C_ITError(hi2c);
  }
}


【初始分析（FunctionClassifier）】
- 函数类型：IRQ
- 函数用途/功能描述：Handles I2C error interrupt requests including bus errors, arbitration lost, acknowledge failures, and overrun/underrun conditions
- 是否需要替换：是
- 分类/替换原因：Function is an interrupt handler (IRQHandler) that processes I2C error interrupts. GetFunctionInfo shows it reads I2C status registers (SR1, CR2), clears hardware flags, and writes to control registers. GetMMIOFunctionInfo confirms hardware register accesses. The function updates software error states and calls error callback functions. According to classification priority, it matches IRQ type (interrupt handler) and not CORE (no NVIC/OS/VTOR operations). Replacement strategy removes hardware operations while preserving error state updates and callback calls.
- 原始代码：见上方【函数基本信息】中的函数内容
- 推荐/初始替换代码（FunctionClassifier）：
```
void HAL_I2C_ER_IRQHandler(I2C_HandleTypeDef *hi2c)
{
  HAL_I2C_ModeTypeDef tmp1;
  uint32_t tmp2;
  HAL_I2C_StateTypeDef tmp3;
  uint32_t tmp4;
  uint32_t error = HAL_I2C_ERROR_NONE;
  HAL_I2C_ModeTypeDef CurrentMode = hi2c->Mode;

  /* I2C Bus error interrupt occurred ----------------------------------------*/
  /* Simulate BERR error detection - hardware flag check removed */
  error |= HAL_I2C_ERROR_BERR;
  /* Clear BERR flag - hardware operation removed */

  /* I2C Arbitration Lost error interrupt occurred ---------------------------*/
  /* Simulate ARLO error detection - hardware flag check removed */
  error |= HAL_I2C_ERROR_ARLO;
  /* Clear ARLO flag - hardware operation removed */

  /* I2C Acknowledge failure error interrupt occurred ------------------------*/
  /* Simulate AF error detection - hardware flag check removed */
  tmp1 = CurrentMode;
  tmp2 = hi2c->XferCount;
  tmp3 = hi2c->State;
  tmp4 = hi2c->PreviousState;
  if ((tmp1 == HAL_I2C_MODE_SLAVE) && (tmp2 == 0U) && \
      ((tmp3 == HAL_I2C_STATE_BUSY_TX) || (tmp3 == HAL_I2C_STATE_BUSY_TX_LISTEN) || \
       ((tmp3 == HAL_I2C_STATE_LISTEN) && (tmp4 == I2C_STATE_SLAVE_BUSY_TX))))
  {
    I2C_Slave_AF(hi2c);
  }
  else
  {
    /* Clear AF flag - hardware operation removed */
    error |= HAL_I2C_ERROR_AF;

    /* Do not generate a STOP in case of Slave receive non acknowledge during transfer (mean not at the end of transfer) */
    if ((CurrentMode == HAL_I2C_MODE_MASTER) || (CurrentMode == HAL_I2C_MODE_MEM))
    {
      /* Generate Stop - hardware operation removed */
      /* SET_BIT(hi2c->Instance->CR1, I2C_CR1_STOP); */
    }
  }

  /* I2C Over-Run/Under-Run interrupt occurred -------------------------------*/
  /* Simulate OVR error detection - hardware flag check removed */
  error |= HAL_I2C_ERROR_OVR;
  /* Clear OVR flag - hardware operation removed */

  /* Call the Error Callback in case of Error detected -----------------------*/
  if (error != HAL_I2C_ERROR_NONE)
  {
    hi2c->ErrorCode |= error;
    I2C_ITError(hi2c);
  }
}
```
